runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，留居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Travelled mainly 3-wide with cover in midfield, slightly inconvenienced over 200M out, fought on steadily closing stages without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 大多居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。二百米處略受妨礙。末段持續力拼，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled off midfield on the rail, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W3W4W) Waited with towards rear, wide final bend, stayed on well and made up several places final 150m, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。直路彎走外疊。最後一百五十米保持佳勢，追前數位。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Settled behind midfield on the rail, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Began awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until approaching final 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。未能望空直至趨近最後五十米。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, unable to quicken over 200m out, switched soon after, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，其後恢復走勢，居中間位置。二百米處未能加速，其後瞬即轉換跑線。轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 留居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段對催策反應平平，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Caught 3 wide no cover on pace, gave ground in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W2W2W) Sat outside the leader, traveled fairly, gave ground quickly passing 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側，走勢一般。跑過二百米處時迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Ridden along to lead, weakened on straightening, gave ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 在催策下取得領先。入直路時轉弱，墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Pressed forward from a poor draw to soon take up running obtaining rails run 1100M out, led the field until finding no extra 300M out, folded up quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前，瞬即取得領先。千一米處移入內欄。保持領放，三百米處再無餘力。其後迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Prominent, well placed into home straight, headway up rail to take a narrow lead 200m out, tired closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居前列。入直路時居好位。沿欄追前，二百米處以短距離領先。末段呈現疲態。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W2W) Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders in rail position, good headway to press leader final bend, took a narrow lead 200m out but soon headed by winner, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路彎追前甚多，追迫領放馬。二百米處以短距離領先，但瞬即被頭馬超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。三百米處未能再增速，被超越，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Chased the leader, traveled okay, gave ground slightly inside 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。走勢不俗。最後一百五十米略為墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W) Sat outside the lead, kept on until weakened final 75M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。保持走勢，最後七十五米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W2W2W) Led, headed after 500m, remained prominent, upsides leader 400m out, challenging until no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W2W2W) 領先。跑了五百米後被超越，保持居前列位置。四百米處上前追逼領放馬。挑戰對手直至最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一又四分三個馬位。二百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W2W) Blundered badly and jockey seriously unbalanced, remained in last few into straight, made no further impression.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W2W) 躍出時嚴重失蹄，騎師嚴重失去平衡。入直路時仍居最後數位之內。其後再無表現。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Towards rear, headway from 300m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居後列。自三百米處起追前。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat behind midfield, crowded near the 200M, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。接近二百米處時受擠迫。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Waited with in rear, pushed along wide into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out 600M, very wide turning in, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。六百米處向外移出，入直路時走大外疊。直路早段追前甚多，一百米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (3W4W) Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide towards rear, angled out 500M, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(3W4W) 自第十一檔出閘，留居後列，走第三疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, made contact near 350M, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。接近三百五十米處時發生觸碰。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Raced in touch, ridden to hold position 700m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居啣接位置。七百米處在催策下保持位置。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W3W) Tracked leader, three wide, ridden into home straight, weakened final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走第三疊。入直路時受催策。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Clean jump, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘俐落，受催策上前居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段對催策反應平平，最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Showed speed to get across, kicked top of home straight, headed 200m out and weakened quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 展現前速，切入內疊。直路初加速。二百米處被超越及迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (4W1W1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals on turn, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Mucus in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(4W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前領先。直路彎受對手挑戰。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有痰。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W3W) Heavily bumped out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 700m out, driven 400m out, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 出閘時被大力碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處移離內欄。四百米處受催策。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, showed good speed to lead, joined by rivals top of home straight, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 躍出時發生碰撞。展現甚快前速，領放。直路初被對手追上，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, peaked on run 500M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。五百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on very well in straight, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分三個馬位。直路上保持甚佳走勢，僅能保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路初受催策，但未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run early in home straight, clear run final 200m, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路早段須等待空位出現。最後二百米望空，保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield, made good ground inside 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置。二百米處追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, pushed along widest into home straight, never going pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。從未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Slow to begin, taken back to race at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, made some progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘緩慢，留居後列，落後約六個馬位，走外疊。入直路時落後相同距離。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Soon taken back from a wide barrier settling in rear on rail, met minor interferences 800M out, saved ground on rail turning in for home, shifted out for a run on straightening, produced good late impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後瞬即留居後列，走內欄。八百米處略受干擾。轉直路彎時走內欄節省腳程。入直路時向外移出取位。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Taken back from the wide draw, sat at the rear, limited response when asked. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 自外檔出閘後留居後列。對催策反應有限。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W3W4W) Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, angled out 800M, made contact 700M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W3W4W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。八百米處向外移出。七百米處發生觸碰。入直路時落後約四個馬位，末段保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W3W) Commenced well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no daylight until final 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W3W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。未能望空直至一百五十米處。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Jumped only fairly, sat rear, had difficulty obtaining clear running until 200M, could not make up ground (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。二百米處前難以望空。末段未能追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Sat on pace, weakened and faded in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居前列。直路上轉弱及力竭。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Slowly away and lost ground, raced in rear, still plenty to do top of home straight, strong run final 200m but just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢及失地，居後列。直路初仍落後甚遠。最後二百米走勢強勁，但僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, clear run 200m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。二百米處望空。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及與對手互相碰撞，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W4W) Raced 3 wide in midfield early. Weakened at 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 早段於馬群中間三疊位置競跑。二百米力弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 400M, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, inclined to hang in early in straight, short of rom final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自外檔出閘後留後，居後列，走內疊。四百米處向外移出。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路初傾向內閃，最後一百五十米空位不足。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持佳勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 900m out, clear run 200m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W2W) 起步後不久被碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。九百米處移離內欄。二百米處望空。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Settled worse than midfield, failed to respond (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 居中間之後位置。對催策毫無反應。（表現難以接受。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W) Waited with towards rear, briefly short of room up rail early part of home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路早段一度空位不足，走內欄。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Bumped start, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路早段轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Moderately away from the widest draw, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個馬位，直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W2W) Average to begin, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, hard ridden from 600M but only showed limited response, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘普通，受催策上前，居前列，走第二疊。自六百米處起受力策，但反應僅屬一般。直路早段轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Made running, under pressure 550m to maintain position, headed early in home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 領放。五百五十米處受催策以保持位置。直路初被超越。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W3W) Settled in rear, ran on steadily behind runners in straight despite not having the clearest of runs throughout.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W3W) 居後列。沿途未能完全望空，但直路上仍在馬群後方以穩勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居前列，走第二疊。直路上墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Raced 2 wide in midfield early. Made progress on the inside in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 早段於馬群中間二疊位置競跑。直路上沿跑道內側上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W2W) Began smartly from the widest draw, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速。最後三百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W2W) Average to begin, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead 400M, peaked and headed approaching 100M, stayed on evenly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘普通，受催策上前，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時挑戰領放馬。四百米處取得領先。趨近一百米處時未能再增速，被超越。保持穩勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W4W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, driven 500m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受催策，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, chased along final bend, challenged up rail final 200m, lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎追趕對手。最後二百米沿欄展開挑戰，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W1W) Began well from gate 10, raced in 2nd early, sat right behind the leader after passing 650M, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 50M, headed close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W1W) 自第十檔出閘迅速，早段居第二位。跑過六百五十米處後緊隨領放馬。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上對催策反應甚佳。五十米處取得領先。接近終點時被超越。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Crowded start, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, moved closer turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間稍前位置，走外疊。入直路時追近。三百米處取得領先。末段保持佳勢，但過終點時不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W4W) Tracked leaders, taken wider final bend, wide into home straight, driven 400m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎移出較外疊。入直路時走外疊。四百米處受催策。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (5W3W3W4W) Shifted out on jumping, raced 3 wide with cover slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, kept on well until crowded close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(5W3W3W4W) 躍出時向外斜跑，居中間稍前位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走較外疊。保持佳勢，直至接近終點時受擠迫。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to chase leader, challenged leader 400m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘後受催策以追趕領放馬。四百米處挑戰領放馬。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W1W) Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, headed near 500M, 2nd turning in, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放，領先一個馬位。接近五百米處時被超越。入直路時居第二位。一百五十米處再次領先。保持佳勢，但接近終點時不敵頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, kept on well until approaching final 50M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一個半馬位，走內疊。直路彎居相同位置。保持佳勢至趨近最後五十米，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊。直路早段未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear, 2 wide, angled out after passing 500M, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，居後列，走第二疊。跑過五百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W6W) Sat towards to rear 3 wide, stayed on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W6W) 居後列，走第三疊。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W5W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move approaching 450M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W5W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。趨近四百五十米處時開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat rear, traveled keenly, made some ground over the last 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居後列。搶口。最後二百米略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W3W) Mid division, commenced move out wide 900m out, chased leaders into home straight, sustained run to lead over 200m out, ran on well and only beaten narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居中間位置。九百米處開始上前，走外疊。入直路時追趕領先馬匹。持續追前，二百米處取得領先。走勢良佳，僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W3W) Began well, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, no clear run early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走內疊。趨近五百米處時向外移出。直路初未能望空。衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W4W) Dropped in from widest draw, commenced move out wide 800m out, pushed along widest into home straight, stayed on for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後切入。自八百米處起開始上前，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間位置，落後約四個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, no clear run until final furlong, closed off fairly afterwards.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。未能望空直至二百米處，其後衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W3W) Blundered on jumping, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 1100M, 1 out 1 back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 躍出時失蹄，居第二位，走第二疊。接近千一米處時讓對手過頭。直路彎居第二疊第二位。直路初保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W3W4W) Out with rest, raced towards rear on the inside, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，走內疊。五百五十米處開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in front of midfield, crowded at the Turn, finished off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置。直路彎受擠迫。衝刺尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Shifted in and bumped shortly after start, three-wide in rear, good headway on bend, stayed on but no threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 出閘後不久向內斜跑，發生碰撞。居後列，走第三疊。直路彎追前甚多。保持走勢，但未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Restrained to race 2 wide, 4 lengths back, angled out 350M, very wide turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 受約束，落後四個馬位，走第二疊。三百五十米處向外移出，入直路時走大外疊。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Held up last after sluggish start, still in last place top of home straight, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, held up in the Straight, made minor ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路上受困。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Raced in rear, switched for clear run 400m out, stayed on but never going pace to challenge leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列。四百米處轉換跑線以望空。保持走勢，但從未能加速以挑戰領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Slightly slow out, taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 600M, 4 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, inconvenienced near 250M, made no progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘稍慢，留居中間之後位置，走內疊。跑過六百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路早段未能望空，接近二百五十米處時受妨礙，其後毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, angled out approaching 550M, 7 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。趨近五百五十米處時向外移出。入直路時落後約七個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，落後約四個馬位，走內疊。直路彎前位置相同。末段保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Moderately away from a tricky gate, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 自第九檔出閘普通，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。末段保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W4W) Mid-division, forced wide bend, one paced under pressure and unable to threaten leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W4W) 居中間位置。直路彎被迫走外疊。在催策下保持同速，未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, closed off fairly. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。末段衝刺一般。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W2W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, 7 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W2W3W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，落後約七個馬位，走外疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W5W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, there to turn, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W5W) 自最外檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Shifted out on jumping and bumped, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 躍出時向外斜跑及被碰撞，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, short of room when try to improve in home straight, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。直路上嘗試推進之際空位不足，未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Pressed leader, quickened early to lead top of home straight, stayed on well, pressed by runner-up to line and just prevailed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。直路初加速，取得領先，保持佳勢。被亞軍馬匹追迫至終點，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, under pressure to hold position 500m out, never on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受催策以保持位置。從未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Made contact at start, raced behind midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間之後位置。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W) Out in line, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, took the early lead, headed 1150M, allowed rival to cross near 950M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，早段取得領先。一千一百五十米處被超越。接近九百五十米處時讓對手過頭。中段落後兩個馬位，走第二疊。三百米處未能再加速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先四分三馬位。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Made contact at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved a bit closer after passing 700M, 2nd on turn, bumped early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。跑過七百米處後略為追前。直路彎居第二位。直路初被碰撞。二百米處未能再增速。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W4W5W) Moderately away, raced in midfield on the outside, made contact near 700M, peaked turning in, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W4W5W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走外疊。接近七百米處時發生觸碰。入直路時未能再增速，直路早段轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W7W) Did not show sufficient pace early stages to hold a more forward position as intended, made a wide move from the rear at middle of the turn before closing off fairly in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W7W) 早段未能展現足夠前速以佔取如賽前部署般較為靠前的位置。直路彎中段沿外疊自後列發力上前，其後在直路上衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Well there from a poor draw, came to share the pace rounding home bend gaining slender lead upon straightening, led until finding no extra 150M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘，居好位。轉直路彎時上前並排領先。入直路時領先些微距離。領先直至一百五十米處再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Ridden along to lead until 1200M, weakened inside 200M, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 在催策下領放至千二米處。最後二百米轉弱。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W5W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear on the outside, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W5W) 自最外檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後六至七個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Settled just worse than midfield on rail, came under pressure upon straightening but had nothing to give.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居中間稍後位置，走內欄。入直路時受催策，但再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 9 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 起步後不久被碰撞及失去平衡，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後九個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled fairly, weakened passing 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下領放。走勢一般。跑過二百米處時轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Pushed along from stalls to lead, challenged by rivals 500m out, headed by runner-up 200m out, fought back to lead again 50m out, just prevailed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘後受推策以取得領先。五百米處受對手挑戰。二百米處被亞軍馬匹超越。五十米處反先該駒再次取得領先，險勝而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Commenced well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 2 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，落後約兩個馬位，走外疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Tracked leader, pushed along to chase leader 600m out, stayed on well and just held on in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 跟隨領放馬。六百米處受推策以追趕領放馬。保持佳勢，在多駒幾乎齊過終點下僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Jumped awkwardly, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, similar position on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 200M, finished off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘笨拙，居中間稍後位置，走第三疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初未能望空。跑過二百米處後望空。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Began only fairly, positioned 3 wide with cover, 4 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，落後約四個馬位，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎位置相若。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field, crowded and steadied 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 出閘時向內斜跑及與對手互相碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。三百米處受擠迫及收慢。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat handy, raced wide, gave ground quickly near 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走外疊。接近三百米處時迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Settled within 3L of pace in 5th, commenced move entering straight but faded under pressure inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居第五位，落後領放馬不逾三個馬位。入直路時開始上前，但最後三百米在催策下力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Began awkwardly and sat prominent outside the leader, overraced in the early stages, failed to sustain his run and compounded rapidly at the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘笨拙，居領放馬外側位置。早段搶口。後勁不繼。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Jumped awkwardly, settled handy, lay in in the Straight, failed to respond.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘笨拙，居前列。直路上內閃。對催策毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped awkwardly, chased the leader, gave ground entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘笨拙，追趕領放馬。入直路時墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W5W) Settled midfield 3 wide, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W5W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Taken back from gate 9, raced 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 自第九檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, driven along 600m out, no extra final 200m and gave ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。六百米處受催策。最後二百米再無餘力，墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat handy, not much impression made in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列。直路上無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, under pressure to hold position on bend, struggling.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎在催策下保持位置，掙扎上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure 800m out to chase leaders, stayed on well to close on leaders in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。八百米處在催策下追趕領先馬匹。保持佳勢，直路上追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Held up last from widest draw, pushed along widest into home straight, short-lived effort top of home straight, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。直路初一度發力。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back, angled out 450M, same margin back turning in, no clear run until approaching final 100M, made some progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，落後四個馬位，走第二疊。四百五十米處向外移出，入直路時落後相同距離。未能望空直至趨近一百米處，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W4W) Settled worse than midfield 4 wide no cover, stayed on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第四疊，沒有遮擋。保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Moderately away from gate 13, raced 2 wide, 2-1/2L back, moved closer turning in, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 250M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 自第十三檔出閘普通，落後兩個半馬位，走第二疊。入直路時追近。直路早段對催策略有反應。二百五十米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Chased the leader, traveled nicely, responded well under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬，走勢良佳。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W3W) Tracked leaders, driven 500m out to chase leaders, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處受催策，追趕領先馬匹。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Away well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rivals turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時受對手挑戰。二百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped well from the widest draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead approaching 250M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居前列，走第二疊。入直路時落後半個馬位。趨近二百五十米處時取得領先。二百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W1W1W) Shifted in and bumped at start, ridden along from stalls to lead, headed by winner top of home straight, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W1W1W) 起步時向內斜跑，被碰撞，在催策下領放。直路初被頭馬超越。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Jumped well from gate 9, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, challenged the leader turning in, took the lead 400M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時挑戰領放馬，四百米處取得領先。一百米處未能再增速，被超越。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W4W) Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平，最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 450M, 3-1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內疊。跑過四百五十米處後向外移出。入直路時落後三個半馬位。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W4W5W) Began only fairly, raced at rear on the outside, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight, finished tailed out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W4W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走外疊。直路彎仍遙居於後。直路上毫無進展。大敗而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W1W) Sat last, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W1W) 居包尾位置。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W2W) Bumped leaving stalls, raced in touch with leaders, ridden on bend to chase leaders, unable to secure clear run in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎在催策下追趕領先馬匹。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W2W) Raced in rear after awkward start, good headway final bend and moved smoothly into contention top of home straight, unable to sustain.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。直路彎追前甚多。直路初順利發力上前。後勁不繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W3W) Mid-field, some headway early in home straight, weakened 150m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間位置。直路早段略為追前，一百五十米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made running, pressed in front, headed by winner top of home straight, dropped away quickly, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑，在領放下受追迫。直路初被頭馬超越。迅速墮退，落後甚遠時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield, switched out entering the Straight, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置。入直路時向外移出。末段衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Jumped awkwardly, raced at tail, still last turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off well to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙，居包尾位置。入直路時仍居包尾位置。直路上移出外疊。衝刺良佳。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 wide, found rail 1050M, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居前列，走第二疊。一千零五十米處移入內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled towards rear in 10th or 9th, made no impression in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居後列第九或第十位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Travelled keenly just over 2L back in 6th, drifted slightly further off the pace around home bend, shied away from horse 250M out, kept on steadily without quickening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居第六位，落後稍逾兩個馬位，搶口。轉直路彎時略為墮後，落後領放馬更遠。二百五十米處斜跑避開他駒。保持穩勢，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, angled out early in straight, cleared 250M but only showed limited response, one-paced final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 起步時被碰撞，居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。直路初向外移出。二百五十米處望空，但對催策反應僅屬平平。最後一百五十米保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure to hold position middle stages, weakened quickly home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置。中段在催策下保持位置。直路上迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced in 3rd, saved ground throughout, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，與對手互相觸碰，居第三位。沿途走內疊節省腳程。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W) Shifted in and heavily bumped out of stalls, tracked pace, struggled to hold position from 700m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘時向內斜跑及被大力碰撞，跟隨領放馬。自七百米處起難以保持位置。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead approaching 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 出閘一般，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上對催策反應良佳。趨近一百米處時取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Settled midfield, difficult to make up ground in the Straight (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。直路上難以追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield on outer, no cover throughout, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 自外檔出閘普通，居中間位置，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in rear, struggled to hold position halfway out, left behind home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 起步後不久與對手互相碰撞，居後列。半程時難以保持位置。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened approaching 200M, eased thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時向外斜跑，發生觸碰。居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初未能再增速。趨近二百米處時轉弱，其後收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; Bumped start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, peaked 500M, weakened gradually thereafter.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;起步時與對手互相碰撞，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，在跑道中央競跑。五百米處未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Clean jump, sent forward to take the early lead, headed approaching 1000M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 出閘俐落，早段受催策上前領放。趨近一千米處時被超越。直路彎居第二位。直路早段未能再增速，最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Chased along early to take up prominent position, lost place from halfway, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 早段追趕對手，佔取前列位置。自半程起失位，洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Ridden along from stalls to lead, soon headed top of home straight and dropped away quickly, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘後受催策，領放。直路初瞬即被超越，迅速墮退。落後甚遠時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Tracked pace, driven from halfway, lost position bend, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。自半程起受催策。直路彎失位，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W2W2W) Began well from the widest draw, raced slightly better than midfield on outer early, moved closer after passing 1000M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，早段居中間稍前位置，走外疊。跑過一千米處後追近，中段居第二位。直路初未能再增速，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W2W1W1W) Away with them, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead 1100M, found rail after passing 900M, led by a length on turn, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W2W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前，居前列，走外疊。千一米處取得領先。跑過九百米處後移入內欄。直路彎領先一個馬位。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Began only fairly, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M but made no progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。直路初未能望空。一百五十米處望空，但其後毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居領放馬之後，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W3W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, switched out entering the Straight, closed off well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走勢良佳。入直路時向外移出。末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, sent forward after passing 1200M, took the lead 1050M, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，落後約一個馬位，走第三疊。跑過千二米處後受催策上前。一千零五十米處取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W4W) Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 400M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間位置，走第二疊。四百米處向外移出。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊，最後二百米衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled midfield, traveled only fairly, gave ground inside 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走勢僅屬一般。二百米處墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W3W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步時被碰撞及失去平衡，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Crowded and impeded shortly after leaving stalls, held up, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 出閘後不久受擠迫及受阻礙，留後。直路初仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Raced towards rear, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 居後列。在催策下保持同速，未能作出挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Raced 2 wide at rear early. Kept on evenly in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 早段於馬群後列二疊位置競跑。直路上維持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W3W3W) Bumped shortly after start, mid division, keen early, tried to follow winner through 900m out but failed to respond, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W3W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，早段搶口。九百米處嘗試跟隨頭馬上前，但對催策毫無反應。大敗而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W5W) Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield, 2 wide, angled out after passing 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過五百五十米處後向外移出。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路初未能再增速，末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上對催策反應平平。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W3W4W) Settled midfield, gave ground rounding the Turn, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W3W4W) 居中間位置。轉直路彎時墮退。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Waited with in rear, pushed along 400m out, unable to pick up for pressure, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。四百米處受推策。受催策，但未能加速。毫無表現。

raceinfo_eng.RaceName: THE FRIENDS OF HONG KONG ASSOCIATION CUP (HANDICAP)

raceinfo_chi.RaceName: 香港友好協進會盃（讓賽）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Ridden forward along rail to reach within 3L of pace in 5th, drifted slightly backward to 6th rounding home bend despite niggling along, soon weakened in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前，居第五位，落後領放馬不逾三個馬位，走內欄。儘管受催策，轉直路彎時稍為墮後至第六位。直路上瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Pressed leader, every chance 300m out, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。三百米處甚具爭勝機會。最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Driven forward from a poor draw holding prominent positions well off the rail, came to join race leader briefly onto first turn, but unable to quicken to challenge from 1L joint 2nd into straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前，居前列位置，離欄競跑。開始轉首個彎位時一度追上領放馬。入直路時並居第二位，落後一個馬位，但未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，落後兩個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 950M, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on very well in straight and scored.
(Jockey dropped whip passing 250M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前，居前列。九百五十米處取得領先。入直路時領先一個半馬位。直路上保持甚佳走勢，掄元。
（騎師於跑過二百五十米處時跌掉馬鞭。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （騎師於跑過二百五十米處時跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Sat one pace 2 wide, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Tracked leaders, driven 300m out, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處受催策，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Settled towards rear, switched out rounding the Turn, made steady ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居後列。轉直路彎時向外移出。末段以穩勢追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, pushed along 500m out, challenged up rail from 200m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。五百米處受推策。自二百米處起沿內欄展開挑戰。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W1W) In rear after badly crowded exiting stalls, blocked off turning into home straight, unable to improve position.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘時嚴重受擠迫，其後居後列。轉入直路時受困。末段未能追前。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, closed off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。三百五十米處向外移出。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Slightly slow out, hampered shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘稍慢，其後不久受阻礙，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) Dropped back gradually reaching tail-end coming onto home bend, snuck up on the inside turning in for home, baulked behind runners until the 200M, made no further impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 墮居後列，開始轉直路彎時逐漸墮退至包尾位置。轉入直路時在內疊上前，在馬匹之後受困直至二百米處，其後再無表現。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Farnan from Shady Hustle, a daughter of Hussonet. Horses by the same sire include Daily Acclaim and Grand Eagle. This fellow was given six trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he was taken back and finished sixth under pressure, beaten by 5-1/4Ls, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on May 29. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「輝隆」(Farnan)之後，在港同父馬包括「日日賞」及「神鵰」等駒，生母出自Hussonet。抵港後試閘六次。最近5月29日出試從化草地1200米，早段居後，末段力策下跑第六名，落後頭馬5.25個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Slowly away, held up, left behind home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘緩慢，留後。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Away awkwardly and settled prominent early, overraced early stages, lacked a finishing effort over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙，早段居前列，搶口。末段衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Began awkwardly and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘笨拙及發生觸碰，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled midfield, weakened quickly near the 300M, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。接近三百米處時迅速轉弱。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Caught 3-wide without cover chasing leaders, couldn't sustain run passing 350M and weakened away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 追趕領先馬匹，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。跑過三百五十米處時無以為繼，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Began awkwardly, trailed the field to straight, widest turning in for home, only ran past well-beaten horses.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘笨拙。直路前尾隨馬群。轉入直路時走最外疊。僅能超越已洩氣潰敗的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Took up the front-running position early and posted some very fast sectionals, folded up quickly over final stages and had to pay the price.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 早段取得領先，以甚快步速領放。耗力太多，末段迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Settled midfield, raced wide throughout, weakened passing 250M (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。沿途走外疊。跑過二百五十米處時轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) With leaders, ceded position to travel one-out-one-back in 4th onto home bend, kept on in straight until faded inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 早段居領先馬匹之間。開始轉直路彎時墮居第二疊第二位，即馬群中的第四位。直路上保持走勢，直至最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Shifted out at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside early, 2 wide and moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 3Ls back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 起步時向外斜跑，被碰撞，早段居中間之後位置，走內疊。跑過一千米處後略為追近，走第二疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路早段未能望空。二百米處望空，末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped exiting stalls, held up, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，留後競跑。直路初仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Jumped well from gate 12, raced prominently on the outside, slightly taken back after passing 1200M, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 自第十二檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。跑過千二米處後稍為留後，走第二疊。中段落後兩個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W4W5W) Jumped awkwardly and then checked briefly, in rear, very wide and pushed along turning into home straight, no response.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W4W5W) 出閘笨拙，其後一度勒避，居後列，走大外疊。轉入直路時受推策，毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (3W4W) Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, under pressure from the 550M, gave ground soon after.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第三疊。自五百五十米處起受催策，其後瞬即墮退。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 跟隨領放馬，走第二疊。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W1W1W) Sat last 2 wide, failed to make progress in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W1W1W) 居包尾位置，走第二疊。直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, turned wide into the home straight, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時走外疊。末段對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Travelled in midfield despite ridden along in first 200M, about 4L back in 6th rounding home bend, tight inside runners and baulked for a run early in straight, made no impression inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 儘管首二百米受催策，居中間位置。轉直路彎時居第六位，落後約四個馬位。直路初在對手內側緊迫競跑及受困。最後二百米毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide after passing 600M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過六百米處後走第三疊。直路初對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。末段衝刺尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Rear of mid-field, had to wait for run early in home straight, angled wider 200m out, stayed on, unable to reach leaders.
(Blood in mouth.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。直路早段須等待空位出現。二百米處移出較外疊。保持走勢，但未能追上領先馬匹。
（口內有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Shifted out at start, raced behind midfield, 2 wide, hampered near 900M, 5 lengths back on turn, no clear run early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。接近九百米處時受阻礙。直路彎落後五個馬位。直路早段未能望空。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W3W3W4W) Began well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W3W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎未能再增速，直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked leading pair, under pressure over 400m out, one paced, going late to take third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先兩駒。四百米處受催策，保持同速。末段追前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W2W) Sat outside the lead, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped well, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross after entering the back straight, 2 lengths or so back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，居前列，走第二疊。進入對面直路後讓對手過頭。中段落後約兩個馬位。直路初未能再增速。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W3W2W2W) Jumped well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百米轉弱及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W3W2W2W) Caught 3 wide early on pace, stride forward to sit outside leader, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W3W2W2W) 早段居前列，走第三疊。展步上前，居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Began well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。直路彎前走勢良佳。二百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Checked on jumping, sat rear, minor progress made when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 躍出時勒避，居後列。在催策下略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, taken back to race at rear, travelled keenly after passing 800M, 3-1/2L back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，留居後列。跑過八百米處後搶口。入直路時落後三個半馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W5W) Settled in last few from a poor draw, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W5W) 自第十檔出閘，居最後數位之內。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W1W) Slowly into stride from wide draw, raced in last place, pushed along and a bit detached 500m out, good late headway final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W1W) 自外檔出閘緩慢，居包尾位置。受推策，五百米處稍被拋離。最後一百五十米追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Mid-field, ridden along into home straight and unable to hold position, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置。入直路時受催策，未能保持位置。轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat on pace, nothing extra in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。直路上再無餘力。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Settled wide in last few dropping to last about 900M out, made no further impression from a similar position into home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 居最後數位之內，走外疊。約九百米處墮居包尾位置。入直路時居相若位置，其後再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Soon taken back to worse than midfield, lost cover 3-wide rounding home bend dropping to last into straight, kept on under pressure past well-beaten horses.
(Sustained a cut to its right front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a cut to its right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 瞬即留居中間之後位置。轉直路彎時走第三疊，失去遮擋。入直路時墮居包尾位置。在催策下保持走勢，末段超越已洩氣潰敗的對手。
（右前腿割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Mid-field, stayed on final 200m, unable to reach winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。最後二百米保持走勢，未能追上頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled well behind on rail and waited with, snuck closer on the inside after straightening but ran out of room from 300M out and forced to check and stumbled over 100M out, never recovered.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 遙居於後，留力候上，走內欄。入直路後在內疊追近，但自三百米處起空位不足。一百米處被迫勒避，失蹄，從未恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Hampered soon after start, held up in last pair, headway up inside rail final 150m, never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 起步後瞬即受阻礙，留居最後兩位之內。最後一百五十米沿內欄追前。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield, picked off weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。末段超越已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Tracked pace, made contact with rival when improving on bend, challenged from top of home straight, unable to sustain effort and faded final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬。直路彎推進時與對手互相觸碰。自直路初起受挑戰。最後一百五十米後勁不繼及力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Pressed leader, quickened early in home straight to lead, kicked two lengths clear 200m out, tired closing stages and just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。直路早段加速，取得領先。二百米處加速帶離兩個馬位。末段呈現疲態，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped leaving stalls, tracked leaders, unable to secure clear run until 200m out and hung out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。未能望空直至二百米處，外閃。末段走勢良佳，僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat on pace on the rail, traveled strongly, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居前列，走內欄。走勢強勁。已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, switched for clear run top of home straight, shifted out and bumped 250m out, stayed on well but no further impression on front two late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路初轉換跑線以望空。二百五十米處向外斜跑，與對手互相碰撞。保持佳勢，但末段未能進一步威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空，接近二百五十米處時望空。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, ridden from top of home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，在沒有遮擋下走外疊。自直路初起受催策。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced better than midfield on the outside, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 起步時與對手互相碰撞，失去平衡，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後一至兩個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，取得第四名，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled handy, traveled nicely, kept on well to win.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居前列，走勢良佳。保持佳勢，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W) Began well from a poor draw but gradually taken back remaining wide throughout, reached second last into straight, renewed effort inside final 200M producing good late impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W) 自外檔出閘迅速，但逐漸留後。沿途走外疊。入直路時居尾二位置。最後二百米重新發力。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Sat on pace 3 wide no cover, ran on strongly, just got caught on the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。走勢強勁，僅於終點線上被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W3W) Sat behind mid, traveled strongly, lay in inside 200M, showed dash over the concluding stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走勢強勁。二百米處內閃。末段加速上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Tracked pace, pushed along 400m out, stayed on, tight for room and unable to be ridden out fully final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬。四百米處受推策，保持走勢。最後一百米受緊迫，未能被全力催策。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Sat handy, raced keenly in the early stages, no clear run in the Straight until 150M, not fully tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居前列，早段搶口。直路上未能望空直至一百五十米處，未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Raced in touch with leaders, smooth headway halfway out, pressed on 200m out, strong run to win going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;跟隨領先馬匹。半程時以暢順走勢上前。二百米處受催策。末段走勢強勁，帶離對手勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; Began well from gate 1, taken back to race behind midfield on the middle track, 2 to 3 lengths back at 400M, hard ridden from 250M and made some progress, no extra final 50M.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;自第一檔出閘迅速，留居中間之後位置，在跑道中央競跑。四百米處落後兩至三個馬位。自二百五十米處起受力策，略為追前。最後五十米再無餘力。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Prominent, pushed up to lead 400m out, ran on well but joined by winner 100m out, no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居前列。四百米處在推策下取得領先。保持佳勢，但一百米處被頭馬追上，不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 550M, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎略為追近。五百五十米處向外移出。直路初未能再增速。最後二百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後留後，居包尾位置。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Began only fairly, taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Mid-field, followed winner through 400m out, closed on winner but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置。四百米處跟隨頭馬上前。末段追近頭馬，但一直落後該駒。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) In rear after crowded shortly after start, improved into mid-field by 400m out, angled wide home straight, stayed on final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居後列。四百米處進佔中間位置。直路上移出外疊。最後二百米保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped with them, raced better than midfield, 3 wide with no cover, very wide turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。直路上保持佳勢，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced prominently, weakened 250m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居前列。二百五十米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, kept on without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。保持走勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下領放。走勢暢順，已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race in 2nd, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居第二位。入直路時落後半個馬位。二百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Pressed leader, travelled smoothly, pushed into lead 200m out, headed only late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬，走勢暢順。受推策，二百米處取得領先。僅於末段被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Driven along from stalls to lead 700m out, kicked 300m out, stayed on well but headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘後受催策。七百米處取得領先。三百米處加速。保持佳勢，但接近終點時被頭馬超越。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Capitalist from Let Me Sleep On It, a daughter of Manhattan Rain. Horses by the same sire include Sunlight Power and Superb Capitalist. This fellow was given five trials in Hong Kong for two placings. He shared the lead after jumping awkwardly and finished second under pressure, beaten by 1/2L, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on April 17. In the latest trial, he shared the lead and finished fourth under pressure, beaten by 1-1/2Ls, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on June 12. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「巨富」(Capitalist)之後，在港同父馬包括「陽光勇士」及「八駿巨昇」等駒，生母出自「曼克頓雨」(Manhattan Rain)。抵港後五次試閘兩次上名。4月17日出試從化草地1200米，出閘笨拙，早段並頭領放，末段力策下跑第二名，落後頭馬半個馬位。最近6月12日出試從化草地1200米，早段並頭領放，末段力策下跑第四名，落後頭馬1.5個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Ridden hard to lead, weakened notably inside 300M, failed to respond.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 在力策下取得領先。最後三百米顯著轉弱。對催策毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W) Ridden along from a poor draw to be up with the pace 5-wide, closer to rail 3-wide rounding home bend and shared 2nd into straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策，跟隨領放馬，走第五疊。轉直路彎時移近內欄，走第三疊。入直路時並居第二位。最後三百米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Chased leader, tight for room against rail and had to switch 200m out, stayed on at the one pace after.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 追趕領放馬。沿欄受緊迫，二百米處須轉換跑線，其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Raced prominently, led briefly 200m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列。二百米處一度領先。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W2W) Jumped awkwardly, chased the leader, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W2W) 出閘笨拙，追趕領放馬。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Tracked leader, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領放馬。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Shifted out at start and bumped, tracked leaders on the middle track, hard ridden after passing 350M, peaked 200M, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時向外斜跑及被碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹，在跑道中央競跑。跑過三百五十米處後受力策。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

formguide.comments_eng: New Zealand PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Ace High from Gold Rose, a daughter of Pentire. Horses by the same sire include Armor Golden Eagle and Very Grateful. This fellow was given three trials in Hong Kong for one placing. In the latest trial, he raced handily and finished second under slight pressure, beaten by 1/2L, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on June 22. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「居高成王」(Ace High)之後，在港同父馬包括「穿甲金鷹」及「凱皇寶」等駒，生母出自「奔達」(Pentire)。抵港後三次試閘一次上名。最近6月22日出試從化草地1200米，早段跟前，末段稍騎下跑第二名，落後頭馬半個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Pierata from Written Treaty, a daughter of Declaration Of War. Horses by the same sire include Top Dragon and Amazing Partners. This fellow was given three trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished ninth under pressure, beaten by 6-1/2Ls, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on May 29. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「比樂達」(Pierata)之後，在港同父馬包括「喜尊龍」及「活力拍檔」等駒，生母出自「宣戰」(Declaration Of War)。抵港後試閘三次。最近5月29日出試從化草地1000米，早段居中，末段力策下跑第九名，落後頭馬6.5個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Graff from Baroness de Ville, a daughter of Smart Missile. He will be the first runner of his sire in Hong Kong. This fellow was given three trials in Hong Kong for two wins. He raced handily and won under pressure, by a head, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on May 18. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and won under slight pressure, by a short head, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on June 8. He looks like a player here at the first time of asking.
formguide.comments_chi: Graff之後，為此父系首匹子嗣在港上陣，生母出自「智能導彈」(Smart Missile)。抵港後試閘三次得兩勝。5月18日出試從化草地1000米，早段跟前，末段力策下以一馬頭位之先勝出。最近6月8日出試從化草地1000米，早段居中，末段稍騎下以短馬頭位之先勝出。初出有一爭之力。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Toronado from Attractive, a daughter of Zabeel. Horses by the same sire include Helios Express and Little Paradise. He is a half-brother to Undefeated. This fellow was given six trials in Hong Kong for one placing. He was taken back and finished second under pressure, beaten by 2-1/2Ls, over 1200m AWT in Conghua on May 7. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished eighth under slight pressure, beaten by 11Ls, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on June 12. He's not looking like a first-up winner here.
formguide.comments_chi: 「豪華房車」(Toronado)之後，在港同父馬包括「驕陽明駒」及「小鳥天堂」等駒，生母出自「沙彪」(Zabeel)。與「誰與爭鋒」為半兄弟馬。抵港後六次試閘一次上名。5月7日出試從化泥地1200米，早段居後，末段力策下跑第二名，落後頭馬2.5個馬位。最近6月12日出試從化草地1200米，早段居中，末段稍騎下跑第八名，落後頭馬十一個馬位。不似能一出即勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Made contact shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the middle track in the early stages, peaked on run approaching 500M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，早段居中間之前位置，在跑道中央競跑。趨近五百米處時未能再增速。其後轉弱。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Toronado from Kabini, a daughter of Written Tycoon. Horses by the same sire include Helios Express and Little Paradise. This fellow was given six trials in Hong Kong for one win. In the latest trial, he made all to win under a hold, by 5-1/2Ls, over 1050m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He's a runner of interest here on debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「豪華房車」(Toronado)之後，在港同父馬包括「驕陽明駒」及「小鳥天堂」等駒，生母出自「千秋巨子」(Written Tycoon)。抵港後試閘六次得一勝。最近6月23日出試田泥1050米，早段領放，末段按韁下以5.5個馬位之先勝出。初出預計會有一定走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat behind midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走勢尚可。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W) Raced in touch, good headway to challenge leader 100m out, held final 50m but clear of remainder.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。以佳勢上前，一百米處挑戰領放馬。最後五十米落後，但拋離其他對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Settled towards the rear 2 wide, angled out in the Straight, closed off nicely for 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 居後列，走第二疊。直路上向外移出。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Soon taken back towards rear from a poor draw, travelled 3-wide around home bend and into straight, responded well inside final 300M to prevail near the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自第十三檔出閘後瞬即留居後列。轉直路彎及入直路時走第三疊。最後三百米對催策反應良佳，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W5W) Mid-field, keen mid-race, forward move 300m out, stayed on, unable to reach leaders.
