runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W5W) 居中間位置。中段搶口。三百米處上前。保持走勢，但未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Heavily bumped leaving stalls, keen under restraint, three wide in mid-field, short-lived challenge 400m out, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 出閘時發生大力碰撞。在約束下搶口，居中間位置，走第三疊。四百米處一度發力展開挑戰。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, weakened final furlong. (Performance disappointing, must trial)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。最後二百米轉弱。（表現令人失望，必須試閘及格。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Raced keenly throughout and had to make a wide forward move from the 700M, ran out abruptly near the 150M, faded and eased down thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 沿途搶口。自七百米處起須自外疊發力上前。接近一百五十米處時急促向外斜跑，力竭，其後收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 起步時向外斜跑及觸碰對手，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Taken back to race at rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 留居後列，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。末段以穩勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) Settled rear, raced keenly in the early stages, was held up for clear running until 300M, responded well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 居後列，早段搶口。三百米處前受困而未能望空。末段對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, race keenly throughout, angled off rail 400m out, short of room final 200m, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。沿途搶口。四百米處移離內欄。最後二百米空位不足，未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Tracked pace, struggled to hold position top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬。直路初難以保持位置。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; Raced in rear, forced to steady 300m out when trying to improve, unable to recover.
(Lost right front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;居後列。三百米處在嘗試推進時被迫收慢。其後未能恢復走勢。
（失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。自四百米處起受催策，但未能加速。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Caught racing 3-wide behind midfield, couldn't go on passing 400M and dropped to last mid-straight. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。跑過四百米處時未能上前。直路中段墮居包尾位置。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Settled down 2-wide in midfield, raced keenly middle stages, checked 700M, responded fairly to riding final 400M and was never a threat to leaders.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。中段搶口。七百米處勒避。最後四百米在催策下反應普通，對領先馬匹從未能構成威脅。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Jumped on terms, positioned ahead of midfield 4Ls off the pace, ran on steadily to take 3rd but couldn't get closer to winner over final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，落後領放馬四個馬位。最後一百五十米以穩勢上前，跑獲季軍，但未能追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Chased leaders 2-wide in a race run at good pace, driven out 450M and had every chance. Just missed 3rd spot in a photo finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 追趕領先馬匹，走第二疊，賽事步速偏快。四百五十米處受力策，已獲機會盡展所長。在電眼判決下僅失去季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled rear of midfield 2 wide with cover, switched wide into the straight and stayed on well without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊，有遮擋。入直路時移出外疊。保持佳勢，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Tracked pace, edged ahead 200m out, asserted final 100m and comfortable at line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬。二百米處取得領先。最後一百米控制大局，輕鬆勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Raced in rear, ridden top of home straight, didn't get best of runs final 100m when trying to improve, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列。直路初受催策。最後一百米在嘗試推進之際取位不太暢順，未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out 500M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後三至四個馬位。衝刺良佳，獲得季軍，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W) Travelled in last few, saved ground rounding home bend but angled out for a run entering straight, baulked until switched out for a run 350M out, did best work late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W) 居最後數位之內。轉直路彎時走內疊節省腳程，但入直路時向外移出取位。受困，三百五十米處向外移出取位。末段表現最佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Tracked pace against rail, had to wait for run turning into home straight, switched inside for clear run 300m out, strong run final 200m to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。三百米處移入內疊以望空。最後二百米衝刺強勁，終點線上僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W4W) Jumped on terms, held up in mid-division 3-wide, brought widest to challenge on straightening but ran on only fairly. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，留居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時移出最外疊以展開挑戰，但末段衝刺僅屬一般。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, no daylight until approaching final 150M, kept on well to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後兩至三個馬位。未能望空直至趨近一百五十米處。保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) From draw 1 moved forward to be tracking the leader, couldn't quicken enough to challenge, kept on without threat final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘後上前跟隨領放馬。加速力不足以展開挑戰。最後二百米保持走勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to pick up for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走外疊。末段受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, switched for clear run 550m out, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百五十米處轉換跑線以望空。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Pressed leader, pushed along to chase leader 500m out, weakened quickly home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。五百米處受推策以追趕領放馬。直路上迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, found rail near 800M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。接近八百米處時移入內欄。入直路時落後約兩個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, made minor progress early in straight,
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 起步時向外斜跑，發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路早段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W3W) Fast away, settled just behind leaders, lacked a kick in the straight and failed to get into the finish. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W3W) 出閘迅速，居領先馬匹稍後位置。直路上缺乏加速力，未能爭入前列。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, forced to steady 800m out, ridden top of home straight, faded final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。八百米處被迫收慢。直路初受催策。最後二百五十米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Up with early pace then eased back to a position ahead of midfield and raced 3-wide without cover for majority of the race, soon no extra leaving the turn and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 早段跟上步速，其後收慢留後，居中間之前位置。大部分途程走第三疊，沒有遮擋。跑離直路彎時瞬即再無餘力，包尾大敗而回。（表現難以接受。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Held up last, still in last place top of home straight, unable to secure clear run 250m out, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。二百五十米處未能望空。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初略為追前。二百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled towards the rear 3 wide, made no impression.
(Respiratory condition.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W4W) 居後列，走第三疊。毫無表現。
（異常呼吸狀況。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, under pressure and outpaced briefly over 300m out, stayed on to go second 100m out, no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。受催策，三百米處一度未能跟上步速。保持走勢，一百米處進佔亞席，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide from 650M, 3 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 起步時與對手互相碰撞及失去平衡，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。自六百五十米處起走第三疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初未能望空。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position from 500m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑，發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。自五百米處起難以保持位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Raced wide, shuffled back mid-race, pushed along widest into home straight, did not have speed to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 走外疊。中段墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W3W4W) Prominent early settling 3-wide in midfield, gave ground quickly from 600M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 早段居前列，其後居中間位置，走第三疊。自六百米處起迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, ridden top of home straight, strong run to lead 200m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路初受催策。走勢強勁，二百米處取得領先，其後保持領先至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空。三百米處望空。衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, switched wide for clear run 500m out, under pressure 350m out, strong run final 200m to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。五百米處移出外疊望空。三百五十米處受催策。最後二百米衝刺強勁，終點線上僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Fast into stride, positioned 2 wide, 1 to 2 lengths back, there to turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 50M, won by 3/4L.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 展步迅速，落後一至兩個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上對催策反應甚佳。五十米處取得領先，以四分三馬位之先獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Broke well from the one draw settling in forward of midfield mainly in 5th just under 6L off the pace, gained closer to just over 2L off the lead 200M out, soon found no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，大多居第五位，落後領放馬近六個馬位。其後追近，二百米處落後領放馬稍逾兩個馬位。瞬即再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W2W) Last to jump, sat midfield on the rail, slightly held up early part of the Straight, ran on strongly, always held.
(Jockey dropped right rein between the 200 Metres and the 100 Metres.)
runnerrecords.incident_eng: (Jockey dropped right rein between the 200 Metres and the 100 Metres.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘最慢，居中間位置，走內欄。直路初略為受困。以勁勢上前，但一直落後頭馬。
（騎師於二百米處至一百米處之間右邊韁繩脫手。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （騎師於二百米處至一百米處之間右邊韁繩脫手。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, held up in midfield along the inside, came with a serious challenge passing 300M but was crowded 100M losing momentum. Could have finished closer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，留居中間位置，走內疊。跑過三百米處時展開真正挑戰，但一百米處受擠迫，失去步韻。本可跑入更前位置。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Settled towards rear, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend, tightened and forced to switch inside 400M out, inconvenienced again just inside the 200M, finished off the race well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 居後列。轉直路彎時開始上前，走第三疊。四百米處受緊迫，被迫移向內疊。跑過二百米處後再度受妨礙。末段以佳勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, made contact 700M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。跑過九百米處後略為追近。七百米處發生觸碰。入直路時落後一至兩個馬位。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W6W) Made contact at start and unbalanced, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide into straight, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W6W) 起步時與對手互相觸碰及失去平衡，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。衝刺凌厲，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W6W) Bounded on jumping, raced in midfield on the outside, commenced move after passing 600M, very wide turning in, closed off well to take a place, always just held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W6W) 躍出時向上跳躍，居中間位置，走外疊。跑過六百米處後開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，一直以些微距離落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the outside, 5-1/4L back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 自第九檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後五又四分一個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Disputed led, led from 1000m out, under pressure 350m out, headed by runner-up 300m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 爭奪領先。自一千米處起領先。三百五十米處受催策。三百米處被亞軍馬匹超越。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (3W3W3W3W) Pressed forward from a poor draw before settling 3-wide just worse than midfield in 9th just under 8L off the pace, dropped out of contention rounding home bend from 750M out.
(Sustained a small cut to left front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a small cut to left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(3W3W3W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前。其後居中間稍後的第九位，落後領放馬近八個馬位，走第三疊。自七百五十米處起轉直路彎時墮退，再無爭勝機會。
（左前腿輕微割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W4W) Three wide in mid-field, ridden early in home straight, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路早段受催策，在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(-) (2W2W) From draw 12 pushed forward to track leader, took over nearing 350M and fought hard, shifted in under pressure 150M causing interference to rivals, lost lead inside 100M and caught by 2nd near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(-)(2W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，受推策以跟隨領放馬。接近三百五十米處時取得領先，力拼。一百五十米處在催策下向內斜跑，干擾對手。最後一百米失去領先位置，接近終點時被亞軍馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W) Bumped start, raced prominently but trapped wide early, taken back to race 2 wide slightly better than midfield after passing 1200M, 3Ls back turning in, hit the front 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W) 起步時被碰撞，早段居前列，但走外疊。跑過千二米處後留居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。二百五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後五十米不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Away well, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide from 550M, showed very good response after turning in, took the lead approaching 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。自五百五十米處起走第三疊。入直路後在催策下反應甚佳。趨近二百五十米處時取得領先。保持佳勢，但末段不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W3W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled mainly in rear of midfield on rail, found no extra inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 大多居中間之後位置，走內欄。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Taken back from the outside barrier, sat at the rear, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後留居後列。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) From wide draw obtained a midfield position, 3Ls off the pace 400M, worked home evenly in the run home for 4th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘，居中間位置。四百米處落後領放馬三個馬位。末段保持穩勢，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W5W) Raced behind midfield 5-6Ls back, swung wide into straight then closed off well down the outside. Went 2nd near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W5W) 居中間之後位置，落後五至六個馬位。入直路時移出外疊。其後在外疊衝刺良佳。接近終點時跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W2W) Away with them, raced in 2nd, a length or so back, challenged the leader 550M, took the lead 500M, peaked early in straight, headed 200M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居第二位，落後約一個馬位。五百五十米處挑戰領放馬，五百米處取得領先。直路初未能再增速，二百米處被超越，最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Away well, dropped back to race in midfield, briefly held up near 250M before closing off strongly to win under top weight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，墮居中間位置。接近二百五十米處時一度受困，其後在負頂磅下衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, box seat, well placed into home straight, quickened early in home straight to lead 300m out, ran on strongly to kick two lengths clear 200m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘時發生碰撞，居包廂位置。入直路時居好位。直路初加速，三百米處取得領先。走勢強勁，二百米處加速帶離對手兩個馬位，帶離勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began smartly from gate 13, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自第十三檔出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初對催策略有反應。二百五十米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W2W) Commenced well, raced in 3rd, a length or so back, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood at the left nostril.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，落後約一個馬位。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能構成威脅。（見競賽事件報告。）
（左邊鼻孔有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Fast away from the stalls and sat up on leader's girth, struck the lead when asked 300m out, but unable to hold off the strong-finishing challenger.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居領放馬外側。三百米處在催策下取得領先，但未能抗衡衝刺強勁的頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 400m out, stayed on for pressure, weakened close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。自四百米處起展開挑戰，已獲機會盡展所長。在催策下保持走勢。接近終點時轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began smartly, raced in 2nd, 1/2L back turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位。入直路時落後半個馬位。三百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後一百米不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, travelled smoothly to press on 400m out, headed 200m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速，領放。走勢暢順，四百米處受催策。二百米處被超越。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 躍出時發生碰撞，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持佳勢，跑入季席，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, tracked leaders against rail, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久被碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。未能望空直至一百五十米處。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Bumped on jumping, dropped back and settled near last, left behind by rivals turning in. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，墮居接近包尾位置。入直路時被對手拋離。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Chased leader on the inside after a clean start from draw 1, battled hard to stay in contention early straight, wasn't going as well as the leaders when checked 150 losing momentum.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘俐落，追趕領放馬，走內疊。直路初力拼以保持爭勝機會。一百五十米處勒避，失去步韻，走勢不及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Up with early pace before settling down 3-wide behind leaders without cover, responded well early straight to go 2nd nearing 200M but couldn't sustain run late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 早段跟上步速，其後居領先馬匹之後，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路早段對催策反應良佳。接近二百米處時進佔第二位，但末段後勁不繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, sent forward to race in 2nd, challenged the leader from 600M, kept on well in straight but always just held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，受催策上前，居第二位。自六百米處起挑戰領放馬。直路上保持佳勢，但一直以些微距離落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Clean jump, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘俐落，落後領放馬一個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，但一直落後頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 自外檔出閘後留居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 500M, no clear run early in straight, found daylight 200M, finished off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。自五百米處起走第二疊。直路早段未能望空，二百米處望空。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Dropped back from wide draw, settled near the rear and 6Ls off leader 400M, made some progress and wasn't beaten far at the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮居後列。四百米處落後領放馬六個馬位。末段略為追前，過終點時所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W3W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, some headway on bend, stayed on but never going pace to challenge leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W3W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路彎略為追前。末段保持走勢，但從未能加速以挑戰領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W3W) Settled back in the field 5-6Ls off leaders, pace very slow for the first half of the race, failed to make up ground in the straight. Never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 居後列，落後領先馬匹五至六個馬位。賽事前半段步速非常緩慢。直路上未能追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Raced in rear, switched for clear run top of home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列。直路初向外移出以望空。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W4W) Settled well back from a poor draw and waited with, switched wide for a run into home straight, ran on strongly inside final 350M to hit the front 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W4W) 自外檔出閘，遙居於後，留力候上。入直路時移出外疊取位。最後三百五十米以勁勢上前，一百米處取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, inconvenienced near 900M, moved a bit closer on turn, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。接近九百米處時受妨礙。直路彎略為追近，末段保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (6W2W3W) Sat rear 2 wide, hung out in the straight, not much impression made. (See incident report.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(6W2W3W) 居後列，走第二疊。直路上外閃，無甚表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W1W1W) Soon took up running, obtained run near the rail early in back straight, led until headed about 350M out, weakened in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W1W1W) 瞬即取得領先。對面直路早段移近內欄。領放，直至約三百五十米處被超越。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Soon crossed from a wide draw to track outside leader, gained upper hand under pressure inside the 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 自外檔出閘後瞬即切入，在領放馬外側跟隨。最後一百米在催策下佔得上風。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) One back 3-wide without cover early stages, gained 2-wide position in 2nd early in back straight, in a similar position turning in for home, kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 早段落後一個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。對面直路初進佔第二位，走第二疊。轉入直路時位置相若。末段在催策下保持穩勢，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W2W) Began well from the middle draw sharing pace 3-wide, obtained position alongside leader in 2nd passing the 600M gaining slender advantage into straight, fought on steadily only to be caught close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W2W) 自中間檔位出閘迅速，並排領先，走第三疊。跑過六百米處時居領放馬旁側的第二位。入直路時領先短距離。末段持續力拼，僅於接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Tracked leader, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 跟隨領放馬。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Gradually shifted back early to rear of midfield very wide without cover, ridden slightly closer for 3-wide position with cover home bend, kept on under pressure from over 3L 5th into straight until faded inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 早段逐漸留居中間之後位置，走大外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎受催策，略為追近，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時居第五位，落後逾三個馬位，在催策下保持走勢，直至最後一百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Bumped on jumping, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路早段未能再增速。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Made running, ran on strongly to go clear final 200m despite hanging left, very comprehensive winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑。儘管外閃，但走勢強勁，最後二百米帶離對手。以壓倒性的優勢勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, challenged by rival early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 200M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路早段受對手挑戰。趨近二百米處時未能再增速及被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W1W) Sent forward and lead, kept on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W1W) 受催策上前領放。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W4W) Shifted out at start and bumped, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made very good progress in straight, just beaten in a ding-dong battle.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W4W) 起步時向外斜跑及被碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上追前甚多。末段在叮噹馬頭下僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Began well enough and always in touch with leaders in 3rd spot, failed to quicken in the last furlong (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘頗佳，居第三位，一直跟隨領先馬匹。最後二百米未能加速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast(+) (4W2W2W) Settled worse than midfield, traveled okay, made steady ground late.
(Jockey dropped right rein at 250M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速(+)(4W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。走勢尚可。末段穩步追前。
（於二百五十米處騎師右邊韁繩脫手。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （於二百五十米處騎師右邊韁繩脫手。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W1W2W) Sat behind midfield, made good late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W1W2W) 居中間之後位置。末段追前甚多。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by All Too Hard from Florida Girl, a daughter of Sebring. Horses by the same sire include Must Go and Keefy. This fellow was given five trials in Hong Kong for one placing. In the latest trial, he sat last and finished second under slight pressure, beaten by 2-1/2Ls, over 1200m AWT in Conghua on June 18. He looks a nice horse and could run well here on debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「情深義重」(All Too Hard)之後，在港同父馬包括「德心知遇」及「瑪瑙」等駒，生母出自「識奔」(Sebring)。抵港後五次試閘一次上名。最近6月18日出試從化泥地1200米，早段居後，末段稍騎下跑第二名，落後頭馬2.5個馬位。潛質不俗，初出預計會有良好走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Heavily bumped and lost balance shortly after start, raced in touch with leaders, good headway halfway out, ran on well to close on leaders but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;起步後不久被大力碰撞，失去平衡，跟隨領先馬匹。半程時以佳勢上前。走勢良佳，追近領先馬匹，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; In rear after awkward start, never any room to open up from 300m out, coasted past a few rivals final 150m, never seriously tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，其後居後列。自三百米處起從未能望空。最後一百五十米輕鬆超越數匹對手。從未能真正施為。

formguide.comments_eng: New Zealand PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Shocking from Savanite, a daughter of Savabeel. Horses by the same sire include Packing Angel and Tianchi Monster. This fellow was given four trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished eighth under a hold, beaten by 18-1/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「勁震撼」(Shocking)之後，在港同父馬包括「包裝福星」及「天池怪俠」等駒，生母出自「小法寶」(Savabeel)。抵港後試閘四次。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段居中，末段按韁下跑第八名，落後頭馬18.25個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear, 5 lengths back in the middle stages, made no impression final 400M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，居後列。中段落後五個馬位。最後四百米毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced towards rear on the stands' side, short of room final 400M, not able to test properly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘笨拙及失地，居後列，走外欄。最後四百米空位不足。未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, switched to challenge leaders 500m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處轉換跑線以挑戰領先馬匹。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Taken back to race 3 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 留居後列，落後約六個馬位，走第三疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W2W2W) Ridden along to share outside lead, traveled reasonably well, weakened passing 200M (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W2W2W) 受催策，並排領先，走外疊。走勢不俗。跑過二百米處時轉弱。（表現令人失望。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W) Broke well from wide draw and across to make running, headed by winner 200m out, no extra final 100m and just held second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，切入以領放。二百米處被頭馬超越。最後一百米再無餘力，僅保住亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Prominent and wide early stages, just over 3L back rounding home bend, tired noticeably in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 早段居前列，走外疊。轉直路彎時落後稍逾三個馬位。直路上已疲態畢呈。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W3W2W) Began only fairly from the widest draw, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W3W2W) 自大外檔出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。沿途沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Settled towards the rear 2 wide, made minor late ground. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 居後列，走第二疊。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) Shifted out at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 起步時向外斜跑，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再加速。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Jumped well from gate 10, raced prominently on the stands' side, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 250M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;自第十檔出閘迅速，居前列，靠近外欄競跑。三百米處取得領先。二百五十米處未能再增速及被超越。末段保持穩勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Mid-field, once paced under pressure, late gains but never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。在催策下保持同速。末段追前，但從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W3W) Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out after passing 400M, 4 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過四百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the finish
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置。走勢一般。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W5W) Sat midfield 3 wide, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W5W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W3W) Settled behind midfield, traveled smoothly, made steady progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W3W) 居中間之後位置。走勢暢順。穩步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Settled worse than midfield, traveled okay, responded reasonably well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間之後位置。走勢尚可。對催策反應不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間位置，落後約三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m, beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。最後二百米走勢強勁，僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Settled behind midfield, gave ground inside150M
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置。一百五十米處墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Settled on pace on the rail, nothing extra in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居前列，走內欄。直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 10. raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, made some progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 自第十檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W4W) Raced wide towards rear, passed a few rivals late, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 居後列，走外疊。末段超越數匹對手。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W4W) Bumped on jumping, positioned 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 500M, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W4W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。跑過五百米處後向外移出。入直路時走大外疊。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Niggled along early after bumped leaving stalls, settled in mid-field, angled off rail 300m out, picked up well to challenge, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 出閘時被碰撞，早段受催策，居中間位置。三百米處移離內欄。加速良佳，展開挑戰。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, switched 700m out, quickly lost place early in home straight, detached 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。七百米處向外移出。直路早段迅速失位。二百米處被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Three wide in mid-field, dropped away quickly in home straight, well held from 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路上迅速墮退。自二百米處起落後頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) Jumped nicely, settled midfield 3 off the stands' rail, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)出閘迅速，居中間位置，走外欄第四疊。衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Driven along and outpaced early stages, switched towards centre of course 400m out, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;早段受催策，未能跟上步速。四百米處移向跑道中央。未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Sat just off midfield 1 off the outside rail, slightly held up, ran on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;居中間稍後位置，走外欄第二疊。末段略為受困，走勢一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Settled down midfield not far off the leaders, held up for clear running near 200M then raced tight 150M before responding fairly late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置，落後領先馬匹不遠。接近二百米處時受困而未能望空。一百五十米處緊迫競跑。末段對催策反應一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Sluggish start, mid division, ridden along 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步緩慢，居中間位置。四百米處受催策。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Sat one off the rail alongside the leader, kept on strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居領放馬旁側，走外欄第二疊。末段保持勁勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) Sat near the rear near center, held up until 350M, made good late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)居後列，靠近跑道中央競跑。受困直至三百五十米處。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Tracked pace, under pressure 400m out, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;跟隨領放馬。四百米處受催策。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Bumped at the start and tracked pace, passed tired lead pair, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;起步時發生碰撞，跟隨領放馬。超越已呈疲態的領先兩駒。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; From draw 13 tracked leaders along the stand rail, put in an honest effort chasing winner from 400M but was comfortably held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;自第十三檔出閘，跟隨領先馬匹，走外欄。自四百米處起追趕頭馬，但未能追近該駒。演出穩健。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Sat just behind the leaders one off the stands' rail, ran on nicely, no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;居領先馬匹稍後位置，走外欄第二疊。以佳勢追前，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Close up to leaders early before settling behind mid-pack in middle stages, stayed on steadily final 200M under big weight but never troubled leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段緊隨領先馬匹，其後於中段居中間之後位置。最後二百米在負重磅下保持穩勢，但從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘一般，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Driven along and outpaced early stages, briefly short of room 350m out, ran on strongly final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段受催策，但未能跟上步速。三百五十米處一度空位不足。最後一百米衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W4W) Away well but restrained early to be last in the field, ran past a few tired rivals in the final stages (See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘迅速，但早段受約束，居包尾位置。末段超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, travelled smoothly, closed off nicely, just no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。走勢暢順。衝刺良佳，僅未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Sat towards rear, traveled nicely, switched out rounding the Turn, responded well under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 居後列。走勢良佳。轉直路彎時向外移出。在鞭策下反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Began awkwardly and made contact, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘笨拙及與對手互相觸碰，居後列，走內疊。直路彎略為追近。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, ran green in home straight, flattened out final 200m, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。直路上走勢稚嫩。最後二百米洩氣。落後甚遠時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Raced 2 wide in 2nd position early. Kept on in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 早段走二疊第二位。直路上維持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped awkwardly, soon in a prominent position racing down the center of track, couldn't quicken as well as the leaders final 200M. Comfortably held in 5th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，瞬即居前列，在跑道中央競跑。最後二百米加速力不及領先馬匹。未能追近，取得第五名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Tracked pace, raced towards centre of course, pushed along 400m out, sticking to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;跟隨領放馬，在跑道中央競跑。四百米處受推策。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W2W) Across to press leader, challenged leader turning into home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。入直路時挑戰領放馬。最後二百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W1W) Showed customary early speed to lead, kept going well passing 300M, was strongly challenged by rival late stages but managed to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W1W) 展現一貫前速，帶頭。跑過三百米處時保持佳勢。末段受對手強勁挑戰，但成功保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Moved up to press leader on outside, kept on well in the straight and led nearing 200M, couldn't hold off winner late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 上前追迫領放馬，走外疊。直路上保持佳勢。接近二百米處時領先。末段不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Disputed led, chased winner 400m out, lacked pace to challenge, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;爭奪領先。四百米處追趕頭馬，但速度不足以展開挑戰。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; From draw 1 raced behind midfield towards the outside of the group, ran on one paced final 400M posing little threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;自第一檔出閘後居中間之後位置，靠近馬群外側競跑。最後四百米保持同速，對領先馬匹威脅不大。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along towards centre of course 400m out, bumped 300m out, strong run to lead 100m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間之後位置。四百米處受推策，在跑道中央競跑。三百米處發生碰撞。走勢強勁，一百米處取得領先，其後保持領先，勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, rear of mid-field, briefly hampered 100m out, struggling.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘時向內斜跑，發生碰撞，居中間之後位置。一百米處一度受阻礙，掙扎上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W) In 4th spot always close enough to leaders, moved up to challenge for the lead passing 300M, no match for winner's pace final 200M. Finished clear 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W) 居第四位，沿途緊隨領先馬匹。跑過三百米處時上前爭奪領先。最後二百米加速力不及頭馬。跑獲亞軍，拋離餘駒。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Jumped on terms, up with pace early stages before easing back to a trailing spot behind leaders, fought hard in the straight but couldn't muster the pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 與對手同步出閘。早段跟上步速，其後收慢留居領先馬匹之後，有遮擋。直路上力拼，但未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W2W) Jumped well to race 3rd the rail, travelled smoothly, lifted strongly to win by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W2W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，走內欄。走勢暢順。衝刺強勁，以短距離之先獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Sat just in front of midfield on the rail, ran on nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 居中間稍前位置，走內欄。在催策下走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Raced 2 wide in 5th position early. Kept on evenly in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 早段走二疊第五位。直路上維持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Crowded for room after the start, ended up racing at the back of the field, had some work to do top of the straight, closed off fastest and almost claimed 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 起步後受擠迫，居包尾位置。直路初落後頗遠。末段衝刺最快，幾乎跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled in last few, 3-wide rounding home bend and baulked for a run in home straight until barged his way out over 50M out
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居最後數位之內。轉直路彎時走第三疊。直路上受困，直至五十米處取位上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back from gate 12, raced 2 wide at rear, commenced move approaching 350M, very wide turning in, finished off very strongly to make frame, nearest finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。趨近三百五十米處時開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。衝刺凌厲，取得第四名。過終點時最為接近。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Sat midfield, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;居中間位置。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Settled behind midfield 3-wide, came wide into straight before closing off the race mildly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。入直路時走外疊，其後衝刺普通。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) Set midfield 3 off the stands' rail, ran on nicely, run peaked final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)居中間位置，走外欄第四疊。以佳勢追前。最後五十米未能再增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Raced 3 wide at rear early. Made progress on the inside in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 早段於馬群後列三疊位置競跑。直路上沿跑道內側上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, dropped to mid-field turning into home straight, briefly hampered 300m out, unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。轉入直路時墮居中間位置。三百米處一度受阻礙。未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Broke well from the middle draw, gradually settled 3-wide without cover 2L back in 5th over 600M out, drifted further off the pace rounding home bend and some 4L back into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 自中檔出閘迅速。六百米處逐漸居第五位，落後兩個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。轉直路彎時落後領放馬更遠。入直路時落後約四個馬位。持續力拼，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生觸碰，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Raced in last pair after sluggish start and lost ground, last place entering home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢及失地，居最後兩位內。入直路時居包尾位置，毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back to last from gate 10, ridden quietly, made up some ground over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自第十檔出閘後留居包尾位置，未受積極催策。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Began well from a poor draw sharing early pace, gradually drifted one back 2-wide after first 300M, slightly further off the lead rounding home bend, weakened noticeably upon straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自第八檔出閘迅速，早段並排領先。過了首三百米後逐漸留後一個馬位，走第二疊。轉直路彎時略為落後領放馬更遠。入直路時顯著轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped only fairly, ended up racing at the back of the field, failed to make any real progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，居馬群後列。最後四百米無甚進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Crowded at start, rail position in mid-field, driven along 600m out, unable to pick up for pressure against rail from 400m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間位置，走內欄。六百米處受催策。自四百米處起沿欄在催策下未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) From a low draw obtained a midfield position along the inside, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened to last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自內檔出閘，居中間位置，走內疊。跑過三百米處時無以為繼。轉弱，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Driven along and outpaced early stages, eased when detached 600m out, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 早段受催策，未能跟上步速。六百米處被拋離時收慢。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Caught racing wide no cover in midfield from draw 12, failed to run on final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 自第十二檔出閘，居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。最後四百米未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (1W4W) Never a danger in last few, detached from over 500M out.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(1W4W) 居最後數位之內。從未構成威脅。自五百米處起被拋離。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W3W) Bumped start and unbalanced, unable to slot in early, sent forward after entering the back straight, raced prominently on outer in the middle stages, peaked 400M, bumped 200M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W3W) 起步時發生碰撞，失去平衡，早段未能切入。進入對面直路後受催策上前，中段居前列，走外疊。四百米處未能再增速，二百米處被碰撞，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled in worse than midfield in 8th, checked and switched for a run 300M out but did not find much until too late 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間之後第八位。三百米處勒避，轉換跑線以望空，但空位不足直至一百米處。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Away in line, raced in midfield, was steadied 600M when crowded for room, did not run on when asked for an effort in the home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置。六百米處受擠迫之際收慢。直路上受催策時未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W) Sat handy, traveled smoothly, kept on under whip, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W) 居前列位置，走勢順暢。在催策下保持走勢，末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Tracked leading pair, effort 300m out, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 緊隨領放兩駒。三百米處受催策，最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生觸碰，居後列，走外疊。直路彎略為追近。入直路時走大外疊。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; Crowded start, raced at rear on the stands' rail, checked near 600M, 7 lengths back near 400M, one-paced thereafter.
(Sustained a laceration to the right front cannon.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a laceration to the right front cannon.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;起步時受擠迫，居後列，走外欄。接近六百米處時勒避。接近四百米處時落後七個馬位。其後保持同速。
（右前腿管骨部位割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped well, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden after passing 250M, took the lead 150M, kept on very well to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘迅速，居前列，走外欄。跑過二百五十米處後受力策。一百五十米處取得領先。末段保持甚佳走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Ridden along to lead, unable to hold position from 400m out, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;在催策下取得領先。自四百米處起未能保持位置。遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; From draw 14 went forward to be racing with leaders, responded well up the stand's rail final 200M, just denied.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;自第十四檔出閘，上前與領先馬匹並跑。最後二百米沿外欄競跑時對催策反應良佳。僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Prominent, improved to lead 500m out, pressed on 350m out, headed by winner 100m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居前列。推進上前，五百米處取得領先。三百五十米處受追迫。一百米處被頭馬超越。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W1W) Sent forward to lead, kept on until weakened final 50M. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W1W) 受催策上前帶頭。保持走勢，最後五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Sat on pace on the stands' rail, ran on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居前列，走外欄。走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Sat last, stayed on late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;居包尾位置。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 起步時發生碰撞。沿途居後列。從未有力一爭。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders, well placed into home straight but unable to challenge, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時居好位，但未能展開挑戰。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; In touch with leaders, couldn't keep up halfway, weakened to finish last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;緊隨領放馬匹，半程時未能跟上對手。轉弱，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Settled in mid-field, under pressure halfway, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置。半程時受催策。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, bumped near 1000M, wider on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。接近一千米處時發生碰撞。直路彎走較外疊。直路早段未能再增速。其後轉弱及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, soon headed top of home straight, dropped away quickly final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速領放。直路初瞬即被超越。最後二百五十米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Bumped on jumping, raced wide without cover in midfield, didn't find much when ridden along from 400M. Never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。自四百米處起受催策但無甚餘力。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Made running, struggled to hold the lead early in home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m, eased off.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑。直路早段難以保持領先位置。最後二百米迅速墮退，收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Blundered on jumping and made contact, trapped wide in midfield early, sent forward after passing 1100M, raced prominently in the middle stages but still 3 wide, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 躍出時失蹄，與對手互相觸碰，早段居中間位置，走外疊。跑過千一米處後受催策上前。中段居前列，但仍走第三疊。耗力太多，直路初轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced down center of the track and stayed close to leaders throughout, failed to pick up speed form 400M, no extra mid-straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;在跑道中央競跑，沿途保持緊隨領先馬匹。自四百米處起未能加速，直路中段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced in touch with leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 300m out, no extra final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;跟隨領先馬匹，走外欄。自三百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。最後五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Mustered no early pace, gradually improved his position further up the field at the centre part of the track middle stages, kept finding plenty to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;早段缺乏前速。中段逐漸在馬群中推進上前，在跑道中央競跑。保持勁勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Settled in front of midfield, gave ground quickly entering the Straight (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間之前位置。入直路時迅速墮退。（表現令人失望。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Tracked leaders, under pressure 350m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;跟隨領先馬匹。三百五十米處受催策。最後一百米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Quickest away from the stalls and straight to the lead, setting fast sectionals, stuck to the task until the last 75m, passed by some strong-finishing rivals thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘最快，隨即上前，以快步速領放。持續力拼至七十五米處。其後被衝刺強勁的對手超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, pushed on to the lead setting good pace, headed 250M, no extra closing stages. (Jockey - did not run out the race distance of 1200M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，受推策上前以快步速領放。二百五十米處被超越。末段再無餘力。（騎師表示，坐騎未能應付是賽的千二米途程。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Pressed forward under 10lb claimer, chased leader going into home turn, fought hard to stay in contention early straight, weakened final 100M. (Jockey reminded to ride out to the finish.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 在獲減十磅的騎師胯下受催策上前，入直路彎時追趕領放馬。直路初力拼以保持爭逐機會，最後一百米轉弱。（騎師被提醒她有責任全力催策坐騎至終點。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat behind the leaders 2 wide, kept on nicely for 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居領先馬匹之後，走第二疊。末段保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, responded nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下領放。走勢暢順。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 400m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。自四百米處起展開挑戰，一度極具爭勝機會。保持佳勢，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Tracked leading pair, challenged 300m out and every chance, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先兩駒。三百米處展開挑戰，已獲機會盡展所長。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Clean jump, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, hit the front 400M, kept on very well to the line, won comfortably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘俐落，居前列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置，四百米處取得領先。保持甚佳走勢至終點，輕鬆勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Settled handy, held up in the early Straight, closed off reasonably well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居前列。直路早段受困，末段衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W5W) Held up in wide position, some headway final 300m, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W5W) 留後，走外疊。最後三百米略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) In touch, raced wide, soon lost ground turning into home straight, held when hampered 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。轉入直路時瞬即失地。二百米處受阻礙時受困。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Away with them, raced 3 wide with cover, 2 lengths or so back, carried wider 550M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約兩個馬位，走第三疊，有遮擋。五百五十米處被帶出更外疊。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled greenly, had difficulty obtaining clear running in the early Straight, showed dash over the final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走勢稚嫩。直路初難以望空。最後一百米加速上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight and followed winner through 350m out, stayed on well but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。三百五十米處跟隨頭馬上前。保持佳勢，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, wide on bend, improved to lead over 200m out, tended to edge left in front, headed late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居領先馬匹之後的啣接位置。直路彎走外疊。推進上前，二百米處取得領先。在居前競跑下傾向外閃。末段被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, stayed on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Wide throughout, made contact with rival when improving into contention on bend, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 沿途走外疊。直路彎在上前爭勝之際與對手互相觸碰。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Settled near last early stages, moved closer to midfield approaching 500M, ran on well towards the line getting up for 4th late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 早段居接近包尾位置。趨近五百米處時追近至中間位置。保持佳勢至終點，於末段取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W4W) Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, switched for clear run top of home straight, ran on well final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W4W) 出閘時向外斜跑，被碰撞，居中間之後位置。直路初轉換跑線以望空。最後二百米走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, no clear run early part of the Straight, kept on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路初未能望空。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Slowly away, in rear, pushed along before most, stayed on, encouraging debut.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，較大部分對手更早受推策。保持走勢。初出表現令人鼓舞。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Always rear, forced to check 900M out dropping to last, made no further impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 一直居後列。九百米處被迫勒避，墮居包尾位置。再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Wide in mid-field, lost position entering home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時失位。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Mid-field, one paced under pressure, unable to make any impression on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置。在催策下保持同速，未能對領先馬匹構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Briefly hampered shortly after start, rail position in mid-field, under pressure 600m out to chase leaders, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 起步後不久一度受阻礙，居中間位置，走內欄。六百米處受催策以追趕領先馬匹。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Driven along and outpaced early stages, switched for clear run 300m out, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 早段受催策，但未能跟上步速。三百米處向外移出以望空。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W1W) Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, peaked and headed 350M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W1W) 起步時向內斜跑及發生觸碰，受催策上前取得領先。三百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, headed 200M, retook the lead 50M, kept on well but unable to hold off the challenger late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一個半馬位。二百米處被超越。五十米處重奪領先位置。末段保持佳勢，但未能抗衡對手的挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Driven to take early lead, sat back in 3rd making the home turn, had difficulty obtaining clear running 300M before finishing off steadily to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 受催策，早段領放。轉直路彎時留居第三位。三百米處難以望空。其後衝刺平穩，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders, briefly short of room 400m out, stayed on strongly to lead 100m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，四百米處一度空位不足。保持強勁走勢，一百米處取得領先，帶離對手勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Settled handy, traveled fairly, slightly weakened over the concluding stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列。走勢一般，末段略為轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (1W1W) Sent to forward to lead, kept on nicely without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(1W1W) 受催策上前，取得領先。保持佳勢，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W3W) Tracked pace, pushed along turning into home straight, weakened gradually.
(Sustained an abrasion to the left front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained an abrasion to the left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。轉入直路時受推策。末段逐漸轉弱。
（左前腿擦傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, closed off strongly
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。末段衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat handy, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居前列。走勢不俗。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W4W) Waited with towards rear, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, ran on strongly to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W4W) 居後列，留力候上。未能望空直至三百米處。以勁勢上前，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield on the rail, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置，走內欄。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) From gate 6 not contesting the speed and settled fourth last, made up some ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第六檔出閘，未有爭奪領先，居尾四位置。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Raced in rear, still in rear top of home straight, made up some late ground against rail.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居後列。直路初仍居後列。末段沿欄略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Made running, eased clear over 300m out, closed down but well in control final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑。三百米處望空。最後一百米被追近，但仍然控制大局。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Bounded on jumping and lost ground, raced at rear on the inside, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 躍出時向上跳躍及失地，居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後約八個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居前列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。三百米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Crowded and bumped at start, tracked leaders, pushed along to chase leaders 500m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 起步時受擠迫及發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處受推策以追趕領先馬匹。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Reared on jumping and lost ground, raced at rear, travelled keenly in the early stages, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 躍出時以後足豎立，失地，居後列。早段搶口。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上未能以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped start, positioned 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, 3 wide from 550M, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步時被碰撞，落後約兩個馬位，走第二疊。自五百五十米處起走第三疊。直路初未能再增速。保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W) Awkward start and lost balance, settled in rear of mid-field, ridden on bend to chase leaders, forced to steady 250m out, ran green.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W) 出閘笨拙及失去平衡，居中間之後位置。直路彎在催策下追趕領先馬匹。二百五十米處被迫收慢。走勢稚嫩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Settled worse than midfield on the rail, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Lacked early pace, ridden to soon recover to 7th some 6L back on rail in back straight, tightened and lost a stride 500M out, ran home one-paced in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 缺乏前速。受催策，瞬即恢復走勢。對面直路上居第七位，落後約六個馬位，走內欄。五百米處受緊迫，失去步韻。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Lacked pace early and soon dropped to rear despite ridden early, remained well behind into straight, saved ground home turn, produced good late impression closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 早段欠缺前速，儘管受催策，但瞬即墮居後列。入直路時仍落後甚遠。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Sat at the rear on the rail, stayed on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。保持一般走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, taken wide in straight and made minor progress. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上移出外疊，略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W1W) Mid-field, rail position, forced to angle wide in home straight to challenge, stayed on, got up for second close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路上須移出外疊以展開挑戰，保持走勢。接近終點時進佔亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Dragged back to last from the wide draw, lay out throughout the race, unable to be fully tested final stages (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後留居包尾位置。沿途外閃。末段未能全力施為。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Sat at the rear, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Sat midfield 2 wide, held up top of the Straight, never impress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路初受困，毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Waited with in rear, keen to halfway, angled wide for a run early in home straight, stayed on late but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。半程前搶口。直路早段移出外疊取位。末段保持走勢，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Settled within 2L of pace in 3rd on the rail, saved ground turning in for home but unable to sustain effort shortly upon straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居第三位，落後領放馬不逾兩個馬位，走內欄。入直路時走內欄節省腳程，但入直路後不久無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W1W1W) Won early battle for lead and set good pace, headed 150m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W1W1W) 早段取得領先，以快步速領放。一百五十米處被超越，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Crowded on jumping, sat towards rear, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 躍出時受擠迫，居後列。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Raced very wide throughout, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 沿途走大外疊。自四百米處起在催策下未能加速。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Jumped only fairly, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, moved a little bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走外疊。直路彎略為追近。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Tracked pace three wide, keen early, quickly lost place turning into home straight, soon well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領放馬，走第三疊，早段搶口。入直路時迅速失位，瞬即遙遙落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Stumbled leaving stalls, raced three wide in rear, keen early, briefly hampered 600m out, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘時失蹄，居後列，走第三疊。早段搶口。六百米處一度受阻礙。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (6W1W1W) Jumped well, elected to shift to the tail of the field with the speed underneath, failed to play a part in any stages of the race.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(6W1W1W) 出閘迅速，在偏快步速下留居包尾位置。沿途未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Track leaders against rail, struggled to hold position from 500m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。自五百米處起難以保持位置。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Sluggish start, pushed along and outpaced after halfway, never out of rear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘緩慢。過了半程後受推策，但未能跟上步速。從未超越後列。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (6W3W4W) Caught 3 wide no cover in front of midfield, weakened and faded in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(6W3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上轉弱及力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W) Sat handy 3 wide without cover, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield early, dropped towards rear in the middle stages, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘迅速，早段居中間稍前位置。中段墮居後列。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Fast break, tracked leaders against rail, chased along final bend, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路彎追趕對手。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W3W5W) From draw 13 unable to slot in, raced 3-wide without cover in midfield throughout, couldn't keep up with rivals passing 250M, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W3W5W) 自第十三檔出閘後未能切入，沿途居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。跑過二百五十米處時未能跟上對手，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Slightly slow out and bumped, raced at tail, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 出閘稍慢，被碰撞，居包尾位置。入直路時落後六至七個馬位。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled in the second half of the field on the rail throughout, failed to make any impression in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後半馬群中。沿途走內欄。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sluggish start, dropped in from wide draw, travelling okay top of home straight but still in rear, pushed along, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔起步緩慢，移入內疊。直路初走勢尚可，但仍居後列。末段受推策。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Tracked pace, wide throughout, weakened final 400m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領放馬。沿途走外疊。最後四百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走外疊，大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, across to track leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, moved smoothly into contention 300m out, strong run to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘時發生碰撞，切入以跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。三百米處順勢上前挑戰。走勢強勁，過終點時僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Keen early, tracked leading pair, challenged from 200m out, upsides winner and every chance 100m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 早段搶口，跟隨領先兩駒。自二百米處起展開挑戰。一百米處追上頭馬，一度甚具爭勝機會，但其後再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Settled midfield, raced wide, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) From wide draw obliged to settle behind midfield along the 3-path, not quickened when asked in the straight. Never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 自外檔出閘，其後須居中間之後位置，走第三疊。直路上受催策，但未能加速。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Ridden forward to one back on rail, some 2L back in 3rd rounding home bend, kept on before fading under pressure inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前，落後一個馬位，走內欄。轉直路彎時居第三位，落後約兩個馬位。保持走勢。最後二百米在催策下力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bustled along to take up a position outside leader, run ended soon after turning home and weakened out of contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 受催策，居領放馬外側。轉入直路後瞬即後勁不繼。其後轉弱，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Crowded and checked shortly after start, settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 起步後不久受擠迫及勒避，居中間之後位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Bumped on the hindquarters on jumping and became unbalanced, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 躍出時被碰撞後軀及失去平衡，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Jumped well, raced better than midfield but trapped 3 wide, no cover in the middle stages, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，但走第三疊。中段沒有遮擋。入直路時走更外疊。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Commenced well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled 3 wide near midfield, just one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居接近中間位置，走第三疊。在催策下僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made running, pressured for lead and one of three that raced clear to halfway, headed over 200m out, weakened, eased final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 帶頭競跑。在催策下保持領先位置，為半程前拋離馬群的三駒之一。二百米處被超越，轉弱。最後五十米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 200M, finished 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先四分三個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後二百米未能抗衡頭馬，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, raced prominently, took the lead near 1250M, led by a length in the middle stages, kept on well in straight, shifted out abruptly 100M, always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居前列。接近一千二百五十米處時取得領先。中段領先一個馬位。直路上保持佳勢。一百米處急促向外斜跑。保持領放至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Began well, raced in 2nd, 1-3/4L back turning in, hit the front 200M, peaked and headed 150M, stayed on evenly to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居第二位。入直路時落後一又四分三個馬位。二百米處取得領先。一百五十米處未能再增速及被超越。末段保持穩勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Chased the leader, traveled fairly, briefly held up inside 200M, closed off fairly (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。走勢一般。二百米處一度受困。末段衝刺一般。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Away with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W2W) Sat midfield, traveled okay, responded strongly under whip inside 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W2W) 居中間位置，走勢不俗。最後一百米對鞭策反應強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat rear, made good ground from behind, stretched out nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列。末段自後列追前甚多，衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 450M, not enough room early in straight, cleared 200M, one-paced thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。四百五十米處向外移出。直路早段空位不足。二百米處望空，其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Sat last, picked off a few weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 居包尾位置。末段超越數匹已轉弱的對手。
