runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W3W) In rear after sluggish start, raced keenly throughout, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W3W) 起步緩慢，其後居後列，沿途搶口。未能望空直至三百米處。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Held up, followed winner through 400m out, ran on well final 300m but no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 留後。四百米處跟隨頭馬上前。最後三百米走勢良佳，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Crowded start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 550M, 6 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時受擠迫，留居後列，走內疊。自五百五十米處起走第二疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑獲亞軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled in front of midfield on the rail, switched out in the Straight, ran on nicely, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路上向外移出。末段以佳勢上前，僅保住冠軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。直路彎難以保持位置。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Raced wide in mid-field, headway into contention 200m out, stayed on between horses despite being tight for room.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走外疊。二百米處上前爭勝。儘管在馬匹之間受緊迫，但保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead approaching 150M, kept on very well to the line, easily scored.
(Lost left hind plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上對催策反應甚佳。趨近一百五十米處時取得領先。保持甚佳走勢至終點。從容取勝。
（失去左後蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Began only fairly, raced at rear, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, made good progress after passing 300M, no clear run towards finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路初未能望空。跑過三百米處後追前甚多。末段未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Pressed leader, took narrow lead over 300m out, headed 200m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。三百米處以短距離領先。二百米處被超越。再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Broke well from a wide draw gradually settling within 2L of pace in 3rd on rail, baulked for a run early in straight until the 250M, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，逐漸居第三位，落後領放馬不逾兩個馬位，走內欄。直路初受困直至二百五十米處。其後持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W2W4W) Sat rear, improved and switched out approaching the corner, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W2W4W) 居後列。趨近直路彎時推進及向外移出。衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Settled towards rear, fought on steadily in home straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居後列。直路上持續力拼，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, only one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段在催策下僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W2W) Raced in rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居後列。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W2W) Tracked pace, improved between horses to lead 200m out, in control final 50m, cosy winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 跟隨領放馬。在馬匹之間推進，二百米處取得領先。最後五十米控制大局。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Crowded start, raced at rear on the outside, still 8 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走外疊。入直路時仍落後約八個馬位。直路上追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W3W) Slightly slow out and crowded, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out 500M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W3W) 出閘稍慢及受擠迫，居後列，走內疊。五百米處向外移出。直路初略為追前。二百米處未能再增速。末段以穩勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (3W3W) Taken back from gate 14, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, wider turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(3W3W) 自第十四檔出閘，留居後列，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走更外疊。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名，但未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, forced to switch around winner 300m out, ran on strongly to close on leader but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。三百米處被迫繞過頭馬轉換跑線。走勢強勁，追近領放馬，但一直落後該駒。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made good progress to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in mouth.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後固守內疊，追前甚多，跑獲季軍。（見競賽事件報告。）
（口內有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Settled 3-wide in last few after moderate start, commenced move 600M out swinging wider into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish while hanging in.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 出閘普通，居最後數位之內，走第三疊。六百米處開始上前，入直路時移出較外疊。以穩勢上前，內閃，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back, checked near 600M, still last turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居包尾位置，落後約七個馬位。接近六百米處時勒避。入直路時仍居包尾位置，直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unbale to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, no clear run early in straight, made no progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之後位置，落後約五個馬位，走內疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路早段未能望空，其後毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Crowded start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間之後位置，落後五個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, angled out in the Straight, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路上向外移出。衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, held up early part of the Straight, ran on when in the clear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路初受困。末段在望空下追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Prominent briefly and soon dropped to wide in worse than midfield, produced moderate short-lived effort early in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 一度居前列，瞬即墮居中間之後位置，走外疊。直路初一度發力，走勢普通。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，落後約五個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W) Sat midfield, traveled smoothly, switched out rounding the Turn, responded nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W) 居中間位置，走勢暢順。轉直路彎時向外移出。末段對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, some headway on bend against rail, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。直路彎沿欄略為追前。保持走勢，但速度不足以追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Mid-field, headway over 200m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。二百米處追前。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Made contact shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the outside, 1-1/2L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後一個半馬位。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Mid-field, one paced under pressure when short of room and forced to switch around 200m out, stayed on after, unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，在催策下保持同速，空位不足。約二百米處被迫向外移出。其後保持走勢，未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (3W4W) Caught 3 wide in front of midfield, raced greenly in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第三疊。直路上走勢稚嫩。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Travelled in midfield 3-wide with cover, slightly worse around home bend and given reminders entering straight, kept on under pressure without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。轉直路彎時稍為墮後，入直路時受鞭策。在催策下保持走勢，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Raced towards the rear 3 wide, stayed on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居後列，走第三疊。末段保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Wide in prominent position early, obtained 2nd 2-wide over 1000M out, unable to quicken under pressure in home straight and kept on steadily to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 早段居前列，走外疊。一千米處進佔第二位，走第二疊。直路上在催策下未能加速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Made contact at start, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, 3 wide from 900M, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時發生觸碰，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。自九百米處起走第三疊。入直路時走更外疊。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, under pressure to hold position middle stages, short of room early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。中段在催策下保持位置。直路初空位不足。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Jumped only fairly, tracked leader in a steadily run race, hard driven from 300M, kept up the pressure on the winner final 200M but was always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，跟隨領放馬，賽事步速平穩。自三百米處起受力策，最後二百米持續追迫頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Began well from the one draw and soon took up running, held narrow advantage most of the way until weakened out of contention over 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，瞬即領先。大部分途程保持領先短距離，直至一百米處轉弱，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Niggled along for a prominent position on rail, tracked behind leader coming onto home bend but switched 2-wide 800M out, hit the front into straight only to be narrowly headed 200M out, fought on dourly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 在催策下佔取前列位置，走內欄。開始轉直路彎時跟隨領放馬，八百米處移出第二疊。入直路時取得領先，僅於二百米處被超越，落後短距離。持續力拼至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。衝刺強勁，以一馬頸位之先勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 lengths or so back turning in, angled out early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路早段向外移出。三百米處望空。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W2W3W) Taken back from gate 8, raced at tail, still 9 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, made good progress in the run home to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W2W3W) 自第八檔出閘後留居包尾位置。直路彎仍落後九個馬位。入直路時走大外疊。末段追前甚多，獲得季軍，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W2W2W) Held up last, some headway final bend, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, strong run to edge ahead close home in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W2W2W) 留居包尾位置。直路彎略為追前。未能望空直至一百五十米處。走勢強勁，接近終點時取得領先，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎位置相若。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Settled midfield, checked rounding the Turn when improved into doubtful room, ran on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置。轉直路彎時在推進至空位不足處之際勒避。走勢一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W4W4W) Raced in rear, bumped and taken wider without cover by winner 700m out when trying to improve, under pressure 450m out, stayed on for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W4W4W) 居後列。七百米處在嘗試推進之際被頭馬碰撞及帶出更外疊，沒有遮擋。四百五十米處受催策。其後在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, weakened in the Straight.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (2W1W) Broke well and ridden along on the rail before settling some 2L back approaching first bend, gained closer to pace entering home straight but unable to sustain effort after straightening .
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(2W1W) 出閘迅速，沿欄受催策。趨近首個彎位時落後約兩個馬位。入直路時追近領放馬，但入直路後後繼無力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Broke well to share early lead, taken one-out-one-back to 5th onto home bend, came under pressure upon straightening but steadily faded.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，早段並排領先。開始轉直路彎時留居第二疊第二位，即馬群中的第五位。入直路時受催策，但逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W1W1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, kept on well to hit the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W1W1W1W) 在催策下取得領先，走勢暢順。保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, keen early, tight for room top of home straight, stayed on well final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W) 居中間位置，早段搶口。直路早段受緊迫，最後二百米保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(-) (3W3W3W3W) Jumped well, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover after entering the back straight, moved closer after passing 600M, showed good response early in straight, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(-)(3W3W3W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，走第三疊。入對面直路後沒有遮擋。跑過六百米處後追近。直路初對催策反應良佳，二百米處取得領先。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, led all the way to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 在催策下取得領先，走勢強勁。一放到底勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W2W) Broke well from the one draw gradually settled just over 3L off the pace, came under pressure to challenge rounding home bend sharing 3rd briefly into straight, unable to make any further impression in the run to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，逐漸落後領放馬稍逾三個馬位。轉直路彎時在催策下展開挑戰。入直路時一度並列第三位。末段再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W2W4W) Obtained a handy position just ahead of midfield, close enough to the leaders home turn before driven out to take the lead near 200M, held on well from 2nd and 3rd late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W2W4W) 居中間稍前的好位。直路彎落後領先馬匹不遠。其後受力策，接近二百米處時取得領先。末段保持佳勢，力拒亞軍及季軍馬匹獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Soon took up running taking advantage of the one draw, set steady pace until joined 700M out, re-gained 1L break on straightening only to be denied 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 把握自第一檔出閘的優勢，瞬即取得領先。以平穩步速領放，七百米處被追上。入直路時重奪領先位置，帶離一個馬位。僅於最後一百米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W3W4W) From wide draw slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield, 4-5Ls to make up 400M, ran on steadily to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘，居中間位置，移入第三疊。四百米處落後四至五個馬位。末段以穩勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W2W2W) Moderately away from gate 9, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, sent forward after entering the back straight, 2 wide from 1000M, shared lead turning in, peaked and headed near 250M, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 自第九檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，但走外疊。入對面直路後受催策上前。自一千米處起走第二疊。入直路時並排領先。接近二百五十米處時未能再增速，被超越。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W3W4W) Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, steadied off heels near 800M, 8 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W3W4W) 留居後列，走第二疊。接近八百米處時收慢避開他駒後蹄。入直路時落後約八個馬位。衝刺凌厲，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W3W) Rail position in mid-field, short of room final bend when trying to improve, unable to secure clear run until 150m out, ran on well to close on winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎在嘗試推進之際空位不足。未能望空直至一百五十米處。保持佳勢，追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Crowded on jumping, raced 2 wide at rear, there to turn, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 躍出時受擠迫，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。衝刺良佳，取得第四名，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Away well, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 wide from 600M, hard ridden after passing 400M, took the lead 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。自六百米處起走第二疊。跑過四百米處後受力策。二百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Stayed close enough to leaders, quickened up well passing 350M, led nearing 150M, held on well for the lead final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 保持緊隨領先馬匹。跑過三百五十米處時加速良佳。接近一百五十米處時取得領先。末段以佳勢力拼，保住領先位置。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, driven 500m out, shifted right final 200m, stayed on but no threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。五百米處受催策。最後二百米向內斜跑。保持走勢，但未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in rear of mid-field without cover, good headway on bend, ran on well to lead 100m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎追前甚多。以佳勢上前，一百米處取得領先，其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W3W) Settled midfield 3 wide, angled out in the Straight, closed off strongly, held off a late challenger.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路上向外移出。衝刺強勁，末段力拒對手的挑戰勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Raced wide towards rear, good headway into third 150m out, no further impression on front two late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居後列，走外疊。追前甚多，一百五十米處進佔第三位。末段未能進一步挑戰首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, similar position on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生觸碰，居後列，走外疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初略為追前，一百五十米處未能再增速，保持穩勢至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back, there to turn, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，落後三至四個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Blundered after the start, settled towards the rear, 5Ls to make up 400M, stayed on steadily to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 起步後失蹄，居後列。四百米處落後五個馬位。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, challenged and every chance from 400m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自四百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會，最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Away with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, bumped near 500M, no clear run early in straight, made good progress final 200M to make frame, no threat to the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。接近五百米處時發生碰撞。直路早段未能望空。最後二百米追前甚多，取得第四名。未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W5W) Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W5W) 自第十檔出閘後留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。衝刺凌厲，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, good headway wide on bend, sustained headway to lead 300m out, strong challenge by runner-up but stayed on well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎追前甚多，繼續走外疊。持續上前，三百米處取得領先。末段受亞軍馬匹的強勁挑戰，但保持佳勢，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, taken back to race at tail, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居包尾位置。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上移出外疊。末段衝刺強勁，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W4W) Soon taken well back and waited with, commenced move inside the 400M stalking the eventual winner wide into home straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W4W) 瞬即遙居於後，留力候上。四百米處開始上前。入直路時跟隨頭馬，走外疊。末段以佳勢上前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slow to begin, guided to the fence before improving to race in midfield, kept up the chase on leaders in the straight, held ground final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，移入內欄，其後推進至中間位置。直路上保持追趕領先馬匹。最後一百五十米保持位置。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, short of room early in home straight, some late gains but never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。直路早段空位不足。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W4W) Slightly slow out and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 550M, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W4W) 出閘稍慢及與對手互相觸碰，居中間位置，走第二疊。五百五十米處向外移出。衝刺凌厲，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Sluggish start, rail position in rear of mid-field, under pressure top of home straight, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路初受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Raced in rear after slowly away, wide into home straight, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 出閘緩慢，其後居後列。入直路時走外疊。未能望空直至三百米處。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W5W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear on the outside, very wide into straight, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W5W) 起步時向內斜跑及被碰撞，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路初對催策反應平平，最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped well from gate 12, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened and eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自第十二檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分三馬位。二百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後一百米轉弱及收慢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Tracked pace, led 300m out, headed 200m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 跟隨領放馬。三百米處取得領先。二百米處被超越，其後再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved closer on turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on very well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走外疊。直路彎追近。直路初取得領先。保持甚佳走勢至終點，取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Away well, positioned 1-1/4L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 出閘迅速，落後領放馬一又四分一馬位，走內疊。直路彎居相同位置。直路初保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, keen middle stages, dropped to rear of mid-field on bend, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, strong run to lead on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W2W) 居中間位置。中段搶口。直路彎墮居中間之後位置。未能望空直至二百米處。衝刺強勁，終點線上取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled 3-wide in rear of midfield from a poor draw, inconvenienced 350M out, ran on dourly under pressure to gain upper hand close to home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 自第九檔出閘，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。三百五十米處受妨礙。末段在催策下持續力拼，接近終點時佔得上風。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W) Settled at the rear, switched out top of Straight, stay on well. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W) 居尾列。直路初向外移出。保持佳勢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, responded well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 居後列，走勢暢順。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Settled behind midfield on the rail, kept on nicely when asked, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a nose.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。在催策下保持佳勢。衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍。僅以一馬鼻位之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Away with them, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, there to turn, closed off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約四個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Jumped with them, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上略為追前，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Raced in touch with leaders, pushed along wide into home straight, bumped 450m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 緊隨領先馬匹。入直路時受推策，走外疊。四百五十米處與對手互相碰撞。末段在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W2W2W) Settled at the back from a wide draw and waited with, made up good ground under pressure in home straight though never threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W2W2W) 自外檔出閘後居後列，留力候上。直路上在催策下追前甚多，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W3W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, did not get best of runs in home straight when trying to improve, eye-catching finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W3W) 自最外檔出閘後墮退。直路初仍居包尾位置。直路上嘗試推進時取位不太暢順。以悅目走勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W3W4W) Dropped back to race near the rear, had 5Ls to make up 400M, made some headway without threatening leaders in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W3W4W) 墮居後列競跑，四百米處落後五個馬位，直路上略為追前，但未能對領先馬匹構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents,)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段對催策反應平平，最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Shifted out abruptly shortly after start and made contact, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved closer after passing 1050M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 起步後不久急促向外斜跑，發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走外疊。跑過一千零五十米處後追近。直路彎居第二位。直路初對催策反應平平。一百五十米處轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Settled down 3-wide in midfield, had every chance final 400M, ran on evenly to take 6th not beaten far by first five.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。最後四百米已獲機會盡展所長。保持穩勢，取得第六名，負於首五名馬匹不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W2W) Jumped awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走內疊。趨近五百米處時向外移出。直路上未能以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Hampered start, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 起步時受阻礙，居後列，走內疊。直路彎略為追近，走內欄。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, dropped away rapidly passing 400M to be beaten nearly 20L. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 追趕領先馬匹，走外疊，沒有遮擋。跑過四百米處時迅速墮退，負於頭馬近二十個馬位。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W3W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎走第三疊。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to across, disputed led, struggled to maintain position from 500m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘後受催策以切入，爭奪領先。自五百米處起難以保持位置。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Settled midfield, crowded near the 200M, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置。接近二百米處時受擠迫。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) On jumping made contact with the left side of its starting gate and lost ground, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂左側及失地，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘普通，落後約一個馬位，走第三疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move approaching 500M, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 起步時向內斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間位置，走第二疊。趨近五百米處時開始上前，入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初未能再增速，最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Pressed leader, joined leader 600m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。六百米處追上領放馬。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W2W2W) Pressed forward to be racing in 2nd, fought on one paced in the straight before weakening out of contention final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W2W2W) 受催策上前，居第二位。直路上保持同速。最後一百米轉弱，再無爭逐機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W) Prominent, quickened early in home straight to lead 250m out, stayed on well and in control final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W) 居前列。直路早段加速，二百五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢，最後一百米控制大局。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W3W4W) Pressed forward from an awkward draw, unable to slot in 3 wide facing the breeze the whole trip, under pressure inside 400m, gave ground quickly and tired out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前。未能切入內疊，沿途走第三疊，沒有遮擋。四百米處受催策。其後迅速墮退，力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Across to track leader, travelled smoothly to 400m out and challenged leader, stayed on well but crossed by front three 100m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 切入跟隨領放馬，四百米處前走勢暢順，其後挑戰領放馬。保持佳勢，但一百米處被頭三名馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W4W) Raced 3 wide in 5th position early. Weakened at 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 早段走三疊第五位。三百米力弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W3W) Prominent early, 3-wide without cover rounding first bend, just over 2L off the pace in 4th in back straight, gave ground under pressure inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W3W) 早段居前列。首次轉彎時走第三疊，沒有遮擋。對面直路上居第四位，落後領放馬稍逾兩個馬位。最後二百米在催策下墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped on jumping, ended up racing behind mid-division, failed to respond when driven along 400M. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置。四百米處對催策毫無反應。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Across to press leader early stages, tracked leaders 800m out, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, dropped away quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 早段切入以追迫領放馬。八百米處跟隨領先馬匹。自四百米處起受催策，但未能加速，其後迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders against rail, driven 500m out, unable to pick up for pressure from 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。五百米處受催策。自三百米處起受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W3W1W2W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced in midfield, 3 lengths or so back turning in, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W3W1W2W) 起步時向內斜跑及碰撞對手，居中間位置。入直路時落後約三個馬位。衝刺良佳，取得第四名，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, difficult to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 250M, made minor progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段難以望空。跑過二百五十米處後望空，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Dropped back to the rear on jumping from a wide draw, had a ground saving trip on the inside, had some work to do 400M, closed off fastest to finish a close 5th, nearest at the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮居包尾位置，走內疊節省腳程。四百米處仍落後頗遠。末段衝刺最快，取得第五名。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide, driven 500m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊。五百米處受催策。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sluggish start, raced in touch with leaders, well placed into home straight, one paced and unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，緊隨領先馬匹。入直路時居好位。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Away with them, raced behind midfield on outer, there to turn, hampered early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間之後位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段受阻礙，保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (1W1W) Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前，取得領先。入直路時領先一又四分一個馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速，被超越。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W2W) Dropped back to near last on settling, had plenty to do top of the straight, couldn't finish off.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W2W) 墮居至接近包尾位置。直路初落後甚遠。末段衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (3W2W) Pressed leader, ridden along to chase leader top of home straight, stayed on well but no match for winner, just lost second.
(Lame in left hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(3W2W) 追迫領放馬。直路初在催策下追趕領放馬。保持佳勢，但未能與頭馬抗衡，僅失亞軍。
（左後腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W) Chased leader out wide without cover, ridden top of home straight, stayed on for pressure, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W) 追趕領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路初受催策。在催策下保持走勢，所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Up with early pace, placed under pressure home turn, was crowded and unbalanced 450M losing momentum, failed to pick up in the straight couldn't get back into contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 早段跟上步速。直路彎受催策。四百五十米處受擠迫及失去平衡，失去步韻。直路上未能加速，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W) Across to chase leader, struggled to hold position final bend, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W) 切入追趕領放馬。直路彎難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Prominent, unable to pick up for pressure from top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列。自直路初起受催策，但未能增速。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Well there from a poor draw, gained narrow advantage very wide 1000M out, obtained 2-wide position rounding home bend and soon joined by others after straightening, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘，居好位。一千米處以短距離領先，走大外疊。轉直路彎時走第二疊。入直路後瞬即被其他馬匹追上。最後二百米無以為繼及被後上馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, made running, ridden top of home straight, headed 200m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑及發生碰撞，領放。直路初受催策，二百米處被超越，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Raced prominently behind leader, travelling extremely well turning for home, led 250M and was only pushed out to the line. Maintained his unbeaten record with something in hand.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 居領放馬之後的前列位置。轉入直路時走勢甚佳。二百五十米處取得領先，末段僅受推策，勝來猶有餘力。保持不敗紀錄。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。末段衝刺凌厲，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, ran on strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。以勁勢上前，取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 300m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。自三百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。保持佳勢，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Driven along to chase the pace, responded well on straightening to gain narrow lead nearing 200M before battling on determinedly to prevail from pursuing rivals late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 受催策，追趕領放馬。入直路時對催策反應良佳。接近二百米處時領先短距離。末段以頑強鬥志力拼，力拒緊追的對手取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped only fairly, settle 3Ls off leaders, couldn't quicken to challenge leaders final 300M. Never likely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，落後領先馬匹三個馬位。最後三百米未能加速挑戰領先馬匹。從未看似有力爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; Stayed within striking distance from leaders, briefly held up 250M but lacked a strong response in the final stages.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;保持落後領先馬匹不遠。二百五十米處一度受困，但末段對催策反應欠強勁。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, hung out and made contact near 900M, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place, not quite able to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內疊。接近九百米處時外閃及發生觸踫。直路彎沿欄略為追近。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能展開真正挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Well there, restrained to 3rd passing the 900M, did not find much room behind runners over 150M out, fought on well late to grab 2nd final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居好位，跑過九百米處時受約束，居第三位。一百五十米處在馬匹之後空位不足。末段以佳勢力拼，最後數步取得亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Tracked leader against stand rail, pushed into lead over 150m out, ran on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;跟隨領放馬，走外欄。一百五十米處受推策上前領放，走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast(+) Settled in front of midfield, switched in from 350M, made good progress when asked (Must BT).
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速(+)居中間之前位置。自三百五十米處起向內移入，在催策下追前頗多。（須試閘及格。）
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped only fairly, raced towards rear on the stands' side, moved closer in the middle stages, unable to obtain clear run until final 100M, finished off strongly to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，居後列，靠近外欄競跑。中段追近。未能望空直至一百米處。衝刺強勁，取得亞軍。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W) Jumped on terms from draw 1, positioned ahead of midfield and always in touch with leaders, kept on steadily under pressure final 300M but couldn't close to winner. Lost 2nd near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W) 自第一檔與對手同步出閘，居中間之前位置，一直跟隨領先馬匹。最後三百米在催策下保持穩勢，但未能追近頭馬。接近終點時失去第二位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W3W) Began fairly, soon recovered to rear of midfield in 8th on rail, switched 2-wide over 700M out, baulked behind runners early in straight and hampered 300M out, dropped out tamely.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘一般，瞬即恢復走勢，居中間之後第八位，走內欄。七百米處移出第二疊。直路早段在馬群之後受困。三百米處受阻礙，乏力墮退。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (3W5W) Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, finished off strongly to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(3W5W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。末段衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 2-1/2L behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，落後領放馬兩個半馬位，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路上未能望空。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, took the lead near 300M, ran on strongly when asked, scored comfortably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。接近三百米處時取得領先。在催策下衝刺強勁，輕鬆勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Settled one-out-one-back in 4th, commenced move early in straight holding every chance but hung in and had to be straightened 250M out, faded out of contention inside final 100M.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W3W) 居第四位，落後一個馬位，走第二疊。直路初開始上前。一度甚具爭勝機會，但內閃，二百五十米處須被修正。最後一百米力竭，再無爭逐機會。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed very good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘一般，居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路上對催策反應甚佳。一百五十米處取得領先。末段保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, dropped to rear turning into home straight, switched inside early in home straight, bumped 150m out, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時墮居後列。直路早段移入內疊。一百五十米處與對手互相碰撞。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Positively ridden out the gate and obtained a leading position as expected, pressed by rival throughout the race, couldn't sustain run final 150m and gave ground late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 出閘後受積極催策，一如預期取得領先。沿途受對手追迫。最後一百五十米後繼無力。末段墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Fast break, made running, kicked top of home straight, headed by winner 50m out, just held second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，帶頭競跑。直路初加速。五十米處被頭馬超越。僅能保住亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W2W2W) Crowded after the start, pushed forward to track leader on outside, briefly took over early straight, run ended 150M from home and weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W2W2W) 起步後受擠迫，受推策上前，跟隨領放馬，走外疊。直路初一度領先。一百五十米處無以為繼，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Soon in front, pressed by rival in the lead, headed nearing 200M before fading final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 瞬即帶頭，領先時受對手追迫。接近二百米處時被超越。末段力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Ridden forward after moderate beginning to one-out-one-back position about 1000M out, gained slender advantage briefly upon straightening, folded up quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘普通，其後受催策上前，約一千米處居第二疊第二位。入直路時一度以短距離領先。迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Ridden to lead early stages, ceded advantage for 2nd early on home bend, just behind leaders in 3rd turning into straight, soon weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 早段受催策，取得領先。直路彎早段失去領先位置，居第二位。轉入直路時居領先馬匹稍後的第三位，瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (5W3W3W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly to make up a lot of ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(5W3W3W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。以勁勢上前，追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Chased leaders on jumping from draw 1, gave good response turning home, stormed to the lead nearing 100M winning decisively.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，追趕領先馬匹。轉直路彎時對催策反應良佳。接近一百米處時以勁勢取得領先，以漂亮姿態勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Sat handy 2 wide, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W2W2W) Settled midfield 2 wide, angled out rounding the Home Turn, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。轉直路彎時向外移出。末段衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Raced wide, on heels of leaders entering home straight, unable to sustain effort, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 早段走外疊。入直路時緊隨領先馬匹。其後無以為繼。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Made contact at start, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, angled out 450M, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 起步時發生觸碰，留居後列，落後約五個馬位，走外疊。四百五十米處向外移出。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 起步時發生碰撞及失去平衡，居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎居相若位置。直路初在催策下反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped fairly, moved up to settle just off leaders, responded well to pressure 300M challenging for the lead, peaked on his run passing 100M and outsprinted by first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘一般，上前居領先馬匹稍後位置。三百米處對催策反應良佳，爭奪領先。跑過一百米處時未能再增速，被首兩名馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Soon in front setting the pace, pressured in the lead by rivals from 700M, run ended mid-straight and gave way.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 瞬即領放，主宰步速。自七百米處起在領放下受對手追迫。直路中段無以為繼，墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced prominently on the outside, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居前列，走外疊。入直路時落後一個半馬位。直路初未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped cleanly, vied for lead first half of the race, couldn't quicken passing 400M, faded away final 200M. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘俐落。賽事前半段爭奪領先。跑過四百米處時未能加速。最後二百米力竭。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) From draw 1 took up early running before relinquishing the lead near 800M, retook the lead 150M but lay in forcing jockey to stop riding momentarily. Edged out to 4th near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，於早段領先。接近八百米處時失去領先優勢。一百五十米處再次取得領先，但內閃，導致騎師一度須停止催策。接近終點時被超越，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well, took the lead, led by a length on turn, kept on very well in straight and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，取得領先。直路彎領先一個馬位。直路上保持甚佳走勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made running, tended to hang left under pressure final 250m, headed 50m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 一直領先。最後二百五十米在催策下傾向外閃。最後五十米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Jumped well, showed good speed to lead, kept on nicely, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，展現甚快前速，取得領先。保持佳勢，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
(Sustained a laceration to the right hind leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a laceration to the right hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時向內斜跑及被碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。
（右後腿割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Jumped awkwardly, settled behind midfield, made steady ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘笨拙。居中間之後位置。末段穩步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Tracked leader against rail, driven along to chase leader 450m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。四百五十米處受催策以追趕領放馬。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, peaked and headed 250M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分一個馬位。二百五十米處未能再增速，被超越，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, a length back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居第二位。入直路時落後一個馬位。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Away in line, settled down midfield 4-5Ls off leader, failed to respond under pressure 500M, gave ground soon after straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，落後領放馬四至五個馬位。五百米處對催策毫無反應。入直路後瞬即墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Bumped and lost balance out of stalls, raced in touch with leaders, ridden 300m out, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，失去平衡，跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處受催策，最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Sat at the rear, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居後列。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Trailed the field throughout after slow start, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，其後沿途尾隨馬群。從未看似有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (6W2W4W) Jumped only fairly , settled at the back of the field, brought wide into straight but gave no response.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(6W2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居馬群後列。入直路時移出外疊，但對催策毫無反應。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Sat behind midfield near center track, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間之後位置，靠近跑道中央競跑。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Sat near the rear on the rail, lay in and never seriously tested, did made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;居後列，走外欄。內閃，從未能真正施為。末段略為追前。
